V002-N00424.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00424.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00424.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00424.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00424.definition: 感染丝虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00424.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00424.label: 小儿丝虫病
V002-N00424.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00424.definition: 小儿感染丝虫引起的以发热，下肢皮肤红肿灼痛，睾丸肿痛，小便浑浊，下肢及阴囊肿大为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00424.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00424.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00424.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00424.definition: A parasitic condition mainly found in children caused by an infection with roundworms of the Filarioidea family. It is characterized by fever, skin redness, oedema and burning pain in the lower extremities, testicular pain and swelling, turbid urine, scrotal swelling and identification of microfilariae. This condition is often spread by blood-feeding black flies and mosquitoes. As a result, the microfilariae enter the body and causes damp heat to affect the spleen and kidney.

V002-N00424.label: 小儿丝虫病
V002-N00424.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00424.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00424.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00424.definition: 感染丝虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00424.label: 丝虫病
V002-N00424.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00424.definition: 因携带丝虫幼虫的蚊叮咬后，虫毒侵入，结于肢体经络，湿热瘀滞，内伤脾肾，脂液失摄。以发热，下肢皮肤红肿灼痛，睾丸肿痛，小便混浊，下肢及阴囊肿大，检查发现虫体或微丝蚴为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00425.label: 包虫病
V002-N00425.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00425.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00425.label: 包虫病
V002-N00425.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00425.definition: A zoonotic parasitosis contracted by infection with the eggs of the parasites (hydatid cyst). It is characterized by painless, movable nodules or cysts with normal skin colour. Associated symptoms may include fever, cough, haemoptysis, abdominal pain and bloody stools. The nodules occur when hydatid cysts remain in the liver, lung and intestines and bind with phlegm, stasis and water dampness.

V002-N00425.label: 包虫病
V002-N00425.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00425.definition: 因包虫卵在人体内发育为幼虫，主要寄着于肝肺等处，与痰瘀水湿相搏结而形成的包块。以局部囊肿，检查有包虫征候为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00426.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00426.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00426.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00426.definition: 感染囊虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00426.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00426.label: 小儿囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00426.definition: 小儿感染囊虫引起的以皮下触及痰核包囊，痫病时作，视力障碍等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00426.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00426.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00426.definition: A parasitic condition caused by eating food or drinking water contaminated by tapeworm eggs from human faeces. It is mainly found in children and characterized by palpable subcutaneous solid lumps, seizures, visual impairment and presence of tapeworms. The tapeworm eggs enter the intestine and develop into larvae, which binds with phlegm turbidity and affect the skin, brain and eyes.

V002-N00426.label: 小儿囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00426.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00426.definition: 感染囊虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00426.label: 囊虫病
V002-N00426.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00426.definition: 因绦虫卵在人体内发育为幼虫，与痰浊相搏，寄生于肌肤，脑，眼等处。以痰核包囊，脑系症状（如痫病），视力障碍，检查发现囊虫等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00427.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00427.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00427.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00427.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00427.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00427.definition: 感染姜片虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00427.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00427.label: 小儿姜片虫病
V002-N00427.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00427.definition: 小儿感染姜片虫引起的以粪便检查又姜片虫卵，伴见腹痛、腹泻，面黄体瘦，甚至影响小儿生长发育为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00427.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00427.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00427.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00427.definition: A parasitic condition caused by infection with the intestinal fluke Fasciolopsis buski. It is characterized by presence of flukes or their eggs in the faeces, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, a sallow complexion and weight loss. In children, this condition may cause poor growth and development. It occurs when people eat aquatic plants that have Fasciolopsis sp. encysted on them, which remain in the small intestine to obstruct the flow of qi and affect the transportation and transformation of the spleen.

V002-N00427.label: 姜片虫病
V002-N00427.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00427.definition: 感染姜片虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00427.label: 赤虫病
V002-N00427.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00427.definition: 因吞食粘有赤虫（姜片虫）幼虫的水生植物后，赤虫寄生于人体小肠，以至气机阻滞，脾失健运。以大便检查有姜片虫卵，一般表现有腹痛腹泻，面黄体瘦，甚至影响小儿生长发育为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00428.label: 绦虫病
V002-N00428.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00428.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00428.label: 绦虫病
V002-N00428.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00428.definition: 感染绦虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00428.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00428.label: 小儿绦虫病
V002-N00428.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00428.definition: 小儿感染绦虫引起的以腹痛、腹泻，或泄出白色虫节片，善食而瘦为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00428.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00428.label: 绦虫病
V002-N00428.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00428.definition: A parasitic condition contracted after eating undercooked pork, beef or fish infected with tapeworms belonging to the genus Taenia. It is mainly found in children and characterized by abdominal pain, diarrhoea, weight loss, or presence of tapeworms or larvae in the faeces. The tapeworms remain in the small intestine, obstruct spleen qi and prevent the absorption of nutrients.

V002-N00428.label: 小儿绦虫病
V002-N00428.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00428.label: 寸白虫病
V002-N00428.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00428.definition: 因食寸白虫幼虫而使之寄生于小肠，以致阻滞脾气，耗吸营养。以腹痛腹泻，善食而瘦，大便检查有绦虫卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00429.label: 肝吸虫病
V002-N00429.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00429.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00429.label: 肝吸虫病
V002-N00429.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00429.definition: 肝吸虫寄生于肝内胆道，以胁痛，腹痛，腹泻，食少，黄疸，胁下痞块，检查或肝吸虫卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00429.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00429.label: 肝吸虫病
V002-N00429.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00429.definition: A parasitic condition caused by Fasciola hepatica. It is characterized by pain in the subcostal region, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, a poor appetite, jaundice, masses in the subcostal region and the presence of the eggs of the liver fluke. This condition is often contracted by ingestion of undercooked fish or shrimps. The liver flukes lodge in the bile duct and bind with damp heat to affect the normal functioning of the liver and gallbladder.

V002-N00429.label: 肝虫病
V002-N00429.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00429.definition: 进食未熟而含有肝虫(华支睾吸虫)幼虫的鱼虾之后，肝虫寄生于肝内胆道，湿热虫毒蕴结，肝胆疏泄失常。以胁痛，腹痛，食少，黄疸，胁下痞块，检查获肝虫[华支睾吸虫]卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00430.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00430.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00430.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00430.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00430.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00430.definition: 感染肺吸虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00430.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00430.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00430.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00430.definition: A parasitic condition caused by an infection with the lung fluke. It is characterized by cough, chest pain, and expectoration of discoloured sputum containing clumps of eggs. Epilepsy, paralysis or subcutaneous nodules may also be present. This condition often results from ingestion of river crabs, crayfish or amphibious crabs contaminated with larvae of Paragonimiasis sp. As a result, the adult worms remain in the lung or affect the brain or subcutaneous tissues.

V002-N00430.label: 肺吸虫病
V002-N00430.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00430.definition: 感染肺吸虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00430.label: 肺虫病
V002-N00430.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00430.definition: 因进食含有肺（吸）虫幼虫的生石蟹、  蜞等之后，虫毒蕴结肺络等处。以咳嗽、胸痛、咯铁锈色痰，大便或痰中检查有肺吸虫卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00431.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00431.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00431.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00431.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00431.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00431.definition: 感染蛔虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00431.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00431.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00431.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00431.definition: A parasitic condition mainly found in children and characterized by a poor appetite, periumbilical pain, underweight, swelling of the abdomen, and worms in stools. The roundworm may infest the bile ducts, pancreas or appendix and cause severe complications. The parasite is acquired through ingestion of embryonated eggs in contaminated food. After the eggs are swallowed, they live and remain in the intestines, where they hatch into larvae. Over time, they transform into damp heat to damage the spleen and stomach and absorb nutrients.

V002-N00431.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00431.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00431.definition: 感染蛔虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00431.label: 蛔虫病
V002-N00431.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00431.definition: 吞食粘有蛔虫卵的不洁食物，化生湿热，损伤脾胃，蛔虫得以繁殖并寄居肠道，耗吸营养。以食欲不振，脐周疼痛，甚或体瘦腹大，大便排虫或检查有蛔虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00432.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00432.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00432.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00432.definition: 感染蛲虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00432.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00432.label: 小儿蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00432.definition: 小儿感染蛲虫引起的以夜间肛门或阴部奇痒难忍，或因抓骚引起肛周糜烂、湿疹或出血为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00432.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00432.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00432.definition: A parasitic condition caused by ingesting the eggs of pinworms. It is mainly found in children and characterized by severe itching in the anal or vaginal area. Secondary anal erosion, eczema or bleeding may develop in the areas that are constantly scratched. This condition is usually first identified when live, thin, white pinworms are noticed in the faeces.

V002-N00432.label: 小儿蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00432.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00432.definition: 感染蛲虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00432.label: 蛲虫病
V002-N00432.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00432.definition: 吞食蛲虫卵后，致蛲虫寄生于肠道下端，袭扰大肠、肛门。以肛门奇痒，夜卧不安，在肛周或大便中找到蛲虫或蛲虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00433.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00433.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00433.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00433.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00433.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00433.definition: 感染血吸虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00433.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00433.label: 小儿血吸虫病
V002-N00433.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00433.definition: 小儿感染血吸虫引起的以皮肤瘙痒，咳嗽、腹痛、腹泻，胁下痞块，消瘦，腹水等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00433.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00433.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00433.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00433.definition: A parasitic condition caused by schistosomes. It is characterized by skin itching, cough, abdominal pain, diarrhoea, masses in the subcostal region, weight loss, ascites, and presence of schistosome eggs in stools. This condition is contracted by contact with fresh water organisms contaminated with the parasites. Once the parasites enter the body, they may affect the flow of qi, blood and body fluids in the lung, intestines or liver.

V002-N00433.label: 小儿血吸虫病
V002-N00433.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00433.definition: 发生于小儿的血吸虫病。

V002-N00433.label: 血吸虫病
V002-N00433.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00433.definition: 感染血吸虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00433.label: 蛊虫病
V002-N00433.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00433.definition: 蛊毒由皮毛侵入肺部，下涉肠道，淤积肝络，阻碍气血水液运行。以皮肤瘙痒，咳嗽，腹痛腹泻，胁下痞块，消瘦，腹水，大便检查见蛊虫[血吸虫]卵等为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00434.label: 急性血吸虫病
V002-N00434.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语｜血吸虫病

V002-N00434.label: 急性血吸虫病
V002-N00434.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病｜蛊虫病

V002-N00435.label: 慢性血吸虫病
V002-N00435.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语｜血吸虫病

V002-N00435.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病｜蛊虫病

V002-N00436.label: 晚期血吸虫病
V002-N00436.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语｜血吸虫病

V002-N00436.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00436.label: 晚期血吸虫病
V002-N00436.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00436.definition: Late-stage schistosomiasis characterized by extreme weight loss, positive finding of the rectal mucosa biopsy, ascites, varicose abdominal veins, liver cirrhosis and splenomegaly. Often occurs when prolonged schistosomiasis causes qi and blood to stagnate in the liver and intestines.

V002-N00437.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00437.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜寄生虫病类术语

V002-N00437.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00437.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00437.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜虫病（总）
V002-N00437.definition: 感染钩虫所致的寄生虫病。

V002-N00437.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00437.label: 小儿钩虫病
V002-N00437.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜小儿虫病
V002-N00437.definition: 小儿感染钩虫的以善食易饥，疲乏，皮肤萎黄、浮肿，粪便检查有钩虫卵，伴见贫血、嗜食异物等为主要表现，影响小儿生长发育的寄生虫病。

V002-N00437.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00437.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00437.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00437.definition: A parasitic condition caused by infection with Ancylostoma sp. hookworms. It is characterized by fast hunger after eating food, fatigue, sallow skin, oedema and presence of hookworm larvae in the stools. Alternatively, anaemia or abnormal food preference may be present. In children, this condition may cause poor growth and development. The hookworms enter the body through contact with contaminated faeces or soil, remain in the small intestine and bind with damp heat to consume qi and blood.

V002-N00437.label: 小儿钩虫病
V002-N00437.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00437.label: 钩虫病
V002-N00437.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00437.definition: 感染钩虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00437.definition: 钩虫由皮肤侵入，寄生于小肠，湿热虫毒内蕴，脾虚失运，气血亏虚。以善食易饥，疲乏，皮肤萎黄，浮肿，大便检查有钩虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00438.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00438.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜内科其他疾病
V002-N00438.definition: 感染鞭虫引起的寄生虫病。

V002-N00438.label: 鞭虫病
V002-N00438.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜传染病与寄生虫病｜寄生虫病
V002-N00438.definition: 吞食含有鞭虫卵的食物后，鞭虫寄生于肠道，耗吸水谷精微，使气血亏损。以神疲，乏力，食少，腹痛腹泻，大便检查有鞭虫卵为主要表现的寄生虫病。

V002-N00450.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00450.definition: A condition that often occurs in babies under the age of one year. Characterized by continuous crying during or even through the night but appearing normal at daytime. Often results from spleen cold, heart heat and fear or fright that disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00450.definition: 以婴儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00450.label: 夜啼
V002-N00450.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00450.definition: 以新生儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N00450.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00450.label: 夜啼
V002-N00450.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N00450.definition: 因脾寒、心热、惊恐等所致。以1岁以内婴儿经常在夜间啼哭不停，甚至通宵达旦，而白天如常为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N00450.label: 夜啼

V002-N00450.definition: 因脾寒、心热、惊恐等所致。以1岁以内婴儿经常在夜间啼哭不停，甚至通宵达旦，而白天如常为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N00451.label: 奶癣
V002-N00451.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00451.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00451.label: 奶癣
V002-N00451.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00451.definition: A condition that commonly affects infants or young children. It is characterized by dry or wet skin rashes on the face, torso, and hands and feet, coupled with exudation, skin tearing due to scratching, restlessness, and night crying. Often results from food or drug allergies or wind, damp or heat affecting the skin.

V002-N00451.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00451.label: 婴儿湿疮
V002-N00451.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜外科病

V002-N00451.label: 奶癣
V002-N00451.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证

V002-N00451.label: 婴儿湿疮
V002-N00451.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医皮肤病
V002-N00451.definition: 婴儿湿疮是发于1～2岁婴儿的过敏性皮肤病。又称奶癣、胎敛疮。相当于西医学的婴儿湿疹。其特点是：好发在头面，重者可延及躯干和四肢，患儿常有家族过敏史，多见于人工哺育的婴儿。本病病因病机：由于禀性不耐，脾胃运化失职，内有胎火湿热，外受风热湿邪，两者蕴阻肌肤而成；或因消化不良、食物过敏、衣服摩擦、肥皂水洗涤刺激等诱发。

V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00452.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜心肝系病
V002-N00452.definition: 以小儿骤见生人异物，或骤闻巨大声响，突然惊叫啼哭，甚或面色变异，呕吐，腹痛，腹泻，手足瘈疭等为主要表现的儿科疾病。

V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N00452.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00452.definition: Characterized by sudden screaming or crying, vomiting, facial colour change, diarrhoea and abdominal pain. Often results from fright upon exposure to strangers or unknown events.

V002-N00452.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00452.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V002-N00452.definition: 以小儿骤见生人异物，或骤闻巨大声响，突然惊叫啼哭，甚或面色变异，呕吐，腹痛，腹泻，手足瘛疭等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00452.definition: 小儿由于神气未定，因骤见生人、突遇异物等所致。以突然惊叫啼哭，甚或面色变异、吐泻腹痛等为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N00452.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00452.label: 客忤
V002-N00452.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00452.definition: a seizure of fright that causes vomiting, abdominal pain, and even convulsions

V002-N00453.label: 小儿乳蛾
V002-N00453.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00453.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00453.label: 小儿乳蛾
V002-N00453.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜肺系病
V002-N00453.definition: 发生于小儿的以发热，咽痛，喉核红肿胀大，形如蚕蛾，或表面呈黄白色脓血，或喉核肿大、质硬、暗红等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00453.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00453.label: 小儿乳蛾
V002-N00453.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00453.definition: Characterized by red, swollen tonsil with yellow and white pus-filled spots. Over time, the tonsil may become enlarged and hard on palpation. High fever, sore throat, swollen lymph nodes (glands) in the neck, difficulty swallowing and body aches may be present. It is often caused by pathogenic factors affecting the tonsil, ascending of toxic heat in the lung and stomach, fire (due to yin deficiency of the lung and kidney) scorching the tonsil, malnourishment of the tonsil due to weakness of the spleen and stomach, or retention of phlegm stasis in the throat.

V002-N00453.label: 小儿乳蛾
V002-N00453.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00454.label: 小儿急乳蛾
V002-N00454.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿乳蛾

V002-N00455.label: 小儿慢乳蛾
V002-N00455.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿乳蛾

V002-N00456.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N00456.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00456.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00456.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N00456.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N00456.definition: 发生于小儿的以长期厌恶进食，食量减少但精神尚好为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00456.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00456.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N00456.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00456.definition: Characterized by persistent poor appetite, aversion to food, and significant weight loss, but with normal spirit and physical activities. Alternatively, abdominal distension, belching, and irregular bowel movements may be present. It is often caused by spleen deficiency or damage to stomach yin due to inappropriate feeding or fright.

V002-N00456.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00456.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N00456.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N00456.definition: 发生于小儿的以长期厌恶进食，食量减少为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00456.label: 小儿厌食
V002-N00456.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00456.definition: 厌食是以较长时期厌恶进食、食量减少为特征的一种小儿常见病证。本病多由喂养不当、他伤脾胃、先天不足、情志失调引起，其病变脏腑主要在脾胃，病机关键为脾胃失健，纳化失和。

V002-N00457.label: 小儿口疮
V002-N00457.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00457.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00457.label: 小儿口疮
V002-N00457.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N00457.definition: 发生于小儿的以口腔内的唇、舌、颊及上颚等处黏膜见单个或多个淡黄色或灰白色溃烂点，灼热疼痛反复发作为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00457.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00457.label: 小儿口疮
V002-N00457.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N00457.definition: 发生于小儿的以口腔内的唇、舌、颊及上腭等处肌膜见单个或多个淡黄色或灰白色溃烂点，灼热疼痛反复发作为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00457.label: 小儿口疮
V002-N00457.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00457.label: 小儿口疮
V002-N00457.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00457.definition: 小儿口疮以齿龈、舌体、两颊、上颚等处出现黄白色溃疡，疼痛流涎，或伴发热、周身不适为特征。小儿口疮发生的原因有外因及内因之分，内因责之于素体积热或阴虚，外因责之于感受外邪。本病病变部位在心、脾胃、肾，病机关键是火邪灼伤口舌。

V002-N00458.label: 燕口疮
V002-N00458.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿口疮

V002-N00458.label: 口吻疮
V002-N00458.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病（总）
V002-N00458.definition: 以口角生疮为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N00458.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00458.label: 燕口疮
V002-N00458.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00458.definition: Characterized by small, aphthous sores or erosions on the mouth corners in children. They often result from contraction of exogenous pathogens, heat accumulation in the heart and spleen, or ascending of internal fire due to yin deficiency.

V002-N00458.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00458.label: 口吻疮
V002-N00458.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00458.label: 燕口疮
V002-N00458.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00458.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N00458.label: 口吻疮
V002-N00458.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V002-N00458.definition: 以口角生疮为主要表现的口腔病。

V002-N00458.label: 燕口疮
V002-N00458.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00458.definition: 因心脾积热，或虚火上炎所致。以小儿口角两侧唇边出现溃疡或糜烂为主要表现的口腔类疾病。

V002-N00459.label: 小儿呕吐
V002-N00459.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00459.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00459.label: 小儿呕吐
V002-N00459.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N00459.definition: 发生于小儿的以胃中乳食从口吐出为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00459.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00459.label: 小儿呕吐
V002-N00459.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00459.definition: Characterized by vomiting of breast milk or food after feeding. It is often caused by overfeeding or damage to stomach qi.

V002-N00459.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00459.label: 小儿呕吐
V002-N00459.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N00459.definition: 发生于小儿的以呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00460.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00460.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00460.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00460.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00460.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜肺系病
V002-N00460.definition: 发生于小儿的以咳嗽为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00460.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00460.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00460.label: 小儿咳嗽
V002-N00460.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00460.definition: 咳嗽是以咳嗽阵作为主症的肺系病证。有声无痰为咳，有痰无声为嗽，有声有痰为咳嗽。小儿咳嗽发生的原因，有外因和内因之分，外因责之于感受外邪，其中又以感受风邪为主。内因责之于肺脾虚弱，痰自内生。小儿因肺脏娇嫩，卫外不固，易为外邪所侵，故以外感咳嗽为多见。

V002-N00461.label: 百晬嗽
V002-N00461.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿咳嗽

V002-N00461.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00461.label: 百晬嗽
V002-N00461.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00461.definition: Characterized by cough with profuse sputum and rapid breathing. Often occurs in a newborn within one hundred days after birth. This condition often occurs when wind attacks the lung, causing heat and phlegm to obstruct the free flow of lung qi.

V002-N00461.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00461.label: 百晬内嗽
V002-N00461.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00461.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00461.label: 百晬内嗽
V002-N00461.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00461.definition: cough with sputum and dyspnea occurring in a newborn within one hundred days after birth

V002-N00462.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00462.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00462.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00462.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00462.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜肺系病
V002-N00462.definition: 发生于小儿的以喉肿哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现、反复发作的疾病。

V002-N00462.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00462.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00462.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00462.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00462.definition: 哮喘是小儿时期常见的一种反复发作的哮鸣气喘性肺系疾病。哮指声响言，喘指气息言，哮必兼喘，故通称哮喘。临床以反复发作性喘促气急，喉间哮鸣，呼吸延长，严重者不能平卧，张口抬肩，摇身撷肚，唇口青紫为特征。常在夜半至清晨发作或加剧。哮喘的病因既有外因，也有内因。内因责之于先天禀赋有异，素体肺、脾、肾三脏功能不足，痰饮留伏于肺，成为哮喘之夙根。外因责之于感受外邪，接触异物、异味以及嗜食咸酸等，其中感受外邪是最常见的诱因。

V002-N00462.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00462.label: 小儿哮喘
V002-N00462.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00462.definition: an infantile disease characterized by paroxysmal labored breathing accompanied by a whistling sound

V002-N00463.label: 小儿多动症
V002-N00463.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00464.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N00464.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00464.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00464.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N00464.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜肾系病
V002-N00464.definition: 发生于小儿的以小便次数过多为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00464.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00464.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N00464.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00464.definition: Characterized by increased urination frequency with small amount of urine volume. Urgent, painful urination may also occur. It is often caused by impaired qi transformation of the urinary bladder due to retention of damp heat in the lower jiao, pinworm, stones or emotional disturbance.

V002-N00464.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00464.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N00464.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学肾病
V002-N00464.definition: 发生于小儿的以小便次数过多为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00464.label: 小儿尿频
V002-N00464.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00464.definition: 尿频是小儿常见的一种泌尿系疾病，以小便频急而数为特征。小儿尿频的发生分内因和外因两个方面。外因责之于湿热，多因外感湿热，或坐地潮湿、粪便污染感受湿热邪毒，或因有积滞内蕴化为湿热；内因责之于脾肾亏虚，多由先天禀赋不足，素体虚弱，或后天失调，导致脾肾气虚。尿频的病位在肾与膀胱。

V002-N00465.label: 小儿异食
V002-N00465.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00465.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00465.label: 小儿异食
V002-N00465.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00465.definition: An abnormal craving for objects not normally considered food, including fingernails, paintings on toys, mud, paper, hair, dirt, soil block, coal cinder or rocks. Ingestion of these objects may damage the body. It is often caused by spleen-related malnutrition or intestinal parasites.

V002-N00465.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00465.label: 异食癖
V002-N00465.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病
V002-N00465.definition: 一种特殊的嗜好，是指对生冷食物和正常饮食以外的物品有不可自制的食欲。如善食生米、生豆、生果子、茶叶甚至陶土、粉笔、泥土、蜡烛、砖块、瓦片、破布、纸张、煤渣等。

V002-N00465.label: 异食癖
V002-N00465.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00465.definition: 又称“异食症"。系一种特殊的嗜好，是指对生冷食物和正常饮食以外的物品有不可自制的食欲。如善食生米、生豆、生果子、茶叶甚至陶土、粉笔、泥土、蜡烛、砖块、瓦片、破布、纸张、煤渣等。小儿异食癖常与营养缺乏(如缺铁、缺锌)及管教疏忽等有关;成人罹患异食癖可认为是一种强迫行为。 异食癖的主要危险为食入致病菌、寄生虫卵或有毒物质而致病。

V002-N00465.label: 喜食异物
V002-N00465.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状｜口味偏嗜
V002-N00465.definition: 嗜食生米、泥土、纸张、煤炭、墙皮等各种非食品之异物的表现。

V002-N00466.label: 小儿性早熟
V002-N00466.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00467.label: 小儿惊风
V002-N00467.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00467.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00467.label: 小儿惊风
V002-N00467.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00467.definition: A collective term of infantile unconsciousness, convulsions or seizures due to external contraction or internal dysfunctions. It includes acute infantile convulsion, chronic infantile convulsion and chronic spleen wind.

V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V002-N00468.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜心肝系病｜惊风
V002-N00468.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为特征的惊风。

V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N00468.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00468.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of fever, loss of consciousness, blank staring, trismus, neck stiffness and convulsions of the limbs. Often results from seasonal pathogens, heat or indigestion in the stomach, fear/fright and phlegm accumulation that affects the heart and liver.

V002-N00468.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00468.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V002-N00468.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为主要表现的惊风。

V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00468.definition: 以发病急骤，高热抽搐，昏迷为特征的惊风。

V002-N00468.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V002-N00468.definition: 多因感受时邪，肠胃湿热积滞，以及惊恐、痰食等所致。于多种疾病中突然出现神昏、目直、牙关紧闭、颈项强直、四肢抽搐为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证｜惊风
V002-N00468.definition: 来势急骤，以高热伴抽风、昏迷为特征。多由外感时邪疫疠，内蕴痰热食积以及暴受惊恐引起。

V002-N00468.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00468.label: 急惊风
V002-N00468.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00468.definition: infantile convulsion of acute onset, accompanied by high fever and loss of consciousness

V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N00469.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00469.definition: Characterized by repeated twitching of hands and feet, intermittent convulsions, fatigue, a pale face, sleepiness with eyes unclosed, vomiting and diarrhoea of bluish stools. Often results from healthy qi deficiency, damage to spleen yang or internal stirring of liver wind. It may also develop from acute infantile convulsion.

V002-N00469.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00469.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学心肝病
V002-N00469.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，嗜睡或昏迷为主要表现的惊风。

V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00469.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，昏迷或瘫痪为主症 的惊风。

V002-N00469.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V002-N00469.definition: 因气血亏虚，或由急惊风转化而成，于多种疾病中出现手足蠕动、或抽搐时作时止、神疲面白、大便色青等为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证｜惊风
V002-N00469.definition: 来势缓慢，以反复抽痉、昏迷或瘫痪为主症，预后差。

V002-N00469.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00469.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00469.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00469.definition: repeated infantile convulsion of gradual onset, associated with loss of consciousness or paralysis and poor prognosis

V002-N00470.label: 慢脾风
V002-N00470.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V002-N00470.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00470.label: 慢脾风
V002-N00470.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00470.definition: A critical condition characterized by head shaking with closed eyes, dark bluish face and lips, sweats on the forehead, drowsiness, cold limbs, twitching or convulsion of the limbs, and vomiting of clear water. Often results from excessive or chronic vomiting or diarrhoea damaging spleen yang or surge of internal liver wind.

V002-N00470.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00470.label: 慢脾风
V002-N00470.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00470.label: 慢惊风
V002-N00470.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜神经病学表现｜惊厥
V002-N00470.definition: 因气血亏虚，或由急惊风转化而成，于多种疾病中出现手足蠕动、或抽搐时作时止、神疲面白、大便色青等为主要表现的痉病类疾病。

V002-N00470.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00470.label: 慢脾风
V002-N00470.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00470.definition: a critical case of chronic infantile convulsion marked by yang debilitation and yin exuberance, usually occurring after protracted vomiting and diarrhea with spleen qi deficiency and stirring of liver wind

V002-N00471.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00472.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00473.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00474.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N00474.definition: 发生于小儿的以粪便稀薄而不成形，排便次数增加为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00474.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00474.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N00474.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N00474.definition: 发生于小儿的以粪便稀薄，排便次数增加，或粪便稀薄而不成形为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00474.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N00474.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00474.label: 小儿泄泻
V002-N00474.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00474.definition: 是以大便次数增多，粪质稀薄或如水样为主症的一种小儿常见病。由外感六淫，内伤乳食，脾胃虚弱导致运化失常所致。

V002-N00475.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V002-N00475.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00475.definition: 以臀部、会阴、大腿尿布包裹部位内侧皮肤及外阴黏膜出血红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的小儿皮肤病。

V002-N00475.label: 臀红
V002-N00475.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N00475.label: 小儿湮尻疮
V002-N00475.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00475.definition: Characterized by sore, red and irritated skin on the convex surfaces of the buttocks and the bulge of the groin. Often occurs when the baby’s skin become exposed to urine and faeces in a nappy/diaper.

V002-N00475.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00475.label: 臀红
V002-N00475.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜新生儿疾病

V002-N00477.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00477.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00477.definition: Characterized by delayed movement or language development, dull expression, and learning disability. Vacant look, head shaking or tongue wagging may be present. It is often caused by genetic deficiency, malnutrition, brain injury, high fever and/or drug poisoning affecting brain development.

V002-N00478.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00478.definition: Characterized by muscle flaccidity and impaired voluntary movement control. In severe cases, muscular atrophy or paralysis may be present. This condition is often caused by damp heat, emotional disturbance, genetic deficiency or qi deficiency of the lung and spleen that result in malnourishment of the bones, tendons and muscles.

V002-N00489.definition: Characterized by a sallow complexion, muscle wasting and bulging abdomen. Often results from improper feeding, congenital weakness or deficiency of the spleen and stomach. These factors may cause the failure of qi, blood and nutrients to nourish the zang–fu organs, hence delaying the growth and development of babies.

V002-N00492.label: 疳病
V002-N00492.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜儿童期与青少年期病类

V002-N00492.label: 疳病
V002-N00492.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00492.definition: Characterized by a sallow complexion, muscle wasting and bulging abdomen. Often results from improper feeding, congenital weakness or deficiency of the spleen and stomach. These factors may cause the failure of qi, blood and nutrients to nourish the zang–fu organs, hence delaying the growth and development of babies.

V002-N00492.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00492.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00492.definition: An intermediate stage of infantile malnutrition characterized by emaciation, a sallow complexion, bulging abdomen, veins showing through the skin, poor spirit, and restlessness. Often results from improper feeding or food stagnation in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00490.definition: Characterized by withered skin, dry, thin and brittle hair, emaciation, oedema, purpura, nosebleed or gum bleeding. It is often caused by exhaustion of qi and blood due to extreme deficiency of the spleen and stomach.

V002-N00490.label: 干疳
V002-N00490.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00490.definition: 疳病后期，气血虚衰，脾胃衰败者。以皮肤 干瘪起皱，骨瘦如柴为主要表现的疳病。

V002-N00490.definition: 疳病极期，气血干涸，以皮肤干瘪，骨瘦如柴为特点的疳病。

V002-N00491.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00491.label: 疳气
V002-N00491.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00491.definition: Characterized by a sallow complexion, emaciation, a poor appetite, alternating constipation and diarrhoea, poor spirit and irritability. It is often caused by inappropriate feeding or spleen deficiency.

V002-N00491.definition: 病程短暂，病情较轻的疳证。

V002-N00491.label: 疳气
V002-N00491.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00491.definition: 病程短暂，病情较轻的疳病。

V002-N00494.label: 积滞
V002-N00494.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00494.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00494.label: 积滞
V002-N00494.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜脾胃系病
V002-N00494.definition: 乳食内积，脾胃受损，以小儿乳食减少，口中气味，大便酸腐，腹胀，腹痛，泄泻或便秘，呕吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00494.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00494.label: 积滞
V002-N00494.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00494.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, fullness and pain, accompanied by vomiting, acid reflux, diarrhoea or constipation. Some children may also present with disturbed sleep, teeth grinding and finger-sucking. Over time, indigestion may develop into malnutrition. It is often caused by milk stagnation due to inappropriate feeding or food stagnation in the spleen and stomach due to improper diet.

V002-N00494.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00494.label: 积滞
V002-N00494.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜儿科学脾胃病
V002-N00494.definition: 因乳食内积，脾胃受损所致，以小儿腹胀腹痛，泄泻或便秘，呕吐，为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00494.label: 积滞
V002-N00494.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00494.definition: 因乳食内积，脾胃受损所致，以小儿腹泻或 便秘，呕吐，腹胀腹痛为主要表现的肠胃疾 病。

V002-N00494.label: 小儿食积
V002-N00494.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00494.definition: 是由乳食喂养不当，停积脾胃，运化失健引起的一种病证。以不思乳食，腹胀嗳腐，大便不调为特征。多见于婴幼儿。常在感冒、泄泻、疳证中合并出现。

V002-N00495.label: 乳积
V002-N00495.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞

V002-N00495.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00495.label: 乳积
V002-N00495.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00495.definition: Characterized by frequent foul breath or vomiting of undigested milk. Associated symptoms may include abdominal distension, diarrhoea, crying for no reason, poor sleep, hot breath and dry stools. Often results from improper breast feeding that damages the spleen and stomach and causes milk to stagnate in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00495.label: 乳积
V002-N00495.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00495.definition: 1岁以下小儿因伤乳所致的积滞。

V002-N00495.label: 乳积
V002-N00495.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00495.definition: 1岁以下小儿因伤乳所致的积滞。

V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞

V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N00496.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00496.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension and fullness, belching, acid reflux, decreased appetite, and strong-odoured stools. Associated symptoms may include abdominal pain, crying and irregular bowel movements. Often occurs when improper diet damages the spleen and stomach and food is retained in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00496.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00496.definition: 1岁以上小儿因伤食所致的积滞。

V002-N00496.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜实证
V002-N00496.definition: 由暴饮暴食、过食肥甘厚味或酗酒，以致饮食停滞于胃肠道不能及时运化，遂形成食积证。临床表现为胃脘胀满作痛，嗳腐吞酸，纳呆厌食，恶心或吐出酸腐不化的食物，舌苔腻浊垢，脉滑有力，为食滞于胃脘；脐腹胀满作痛，肠鸣而矢气频传，大便不爽，泄出糊状、水样粪便而臭如败卵，或便秘，苔微黄而根部厚腻，脉沉滑，为食滞于肠道。

V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证

V002-N00496.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00496.label: 食积
V002-N00496.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00496.definition: a diseased state characterized by the accumulation of undigested food in the stomach and intestines, causing abdominal distension and pain, vomiting, diarrhea and anorexia

V002-N00497.label: 肺风痰喘
V002-N00497.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00497.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00497.label: 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00497.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜肺系病
V002-N00497.definition: 发生于小儿的以发热，咳嗽，痰壅，气急为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00497.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00497.label: 小儿肺风痰喘
V002-N00497.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00497.definition: Characterized by fever, cough, panting, nasal flaring and profuse phlegm. In severe cases, consistent high fever, unconsciousness, convulsions and seizures might occur. Often occurs when wind cold or warmth affects the descending and dispersing of lung qi.

V002-N00497.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00497.label: 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00497.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00497.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00497.label: 肺风痰喘
V002-N00497.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜辨证

V002-N00497.label: 肺炎喘嗽
V002-N00497.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00497.definition: 是小儿时期常见的肺系疾病之一，为感受外邪，郁闭肺络所致。以发热，咳嗽，气急，鼻煽为主要症状，重者涕泪俱闭，面色苍白发绀。

V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V002-N00498.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜其他[儿科学]
V002-N00498.definition: 以小儿颅囟应合而不合，颅缝开解，头颅增大，叩之呈破壶音，目珠下垂乳落日状为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00498.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00498.definition: Characterized by an enlargement of the head and retarded closure of the cranial sutures. Often results from congenital defect or retention of excess fluid within the skull due to accumulated toxic heat.

V002-N00498.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00498.definition: 以颅囟应合而不合，颅缝开解，头颅增大，叩 之呈破壶音，目珠下垂如落日状为主要表现 的小儿疾病。

V002-N00498.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N00498.definition: 因先天不足，颅内受损，或因热毒壅滞，水湿停积于脑所致。以头颅增大、囟门和颅缝开解为主要表现的小儿疾病。

V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证

V002-N00498.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00498.label: 解颅
V002-N00498.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00498.definition: abnormal accumulation of excess fluid within the skull marked by enlargement of the head and retarded closure of the skull sutures, the same as hydrocephalus

V002-N00499.label: 小儿温疫类病
V002-N00499.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语

V002-N00499.label: 小儿温疫类病
V002-N00499.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00499.definition: A collective term of contagious paediatric diseases due to contraction of warm epidemic or pestilence.

V002-N00500.label: 奶麻
V002-N00500.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00500.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00500.label: 奶麻
V002-N00500.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00500.definition: 感染外邪，以哺乳期婴儿或幼儿初期骤起高热，热退后肌肤出现玫瑰色细散皮疹为主要表现的出疹性儿科时行病。

V002-N00500.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00500.label: 奶麻
V002-N00500.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00500.definition: Characterized by a sudden high fever and sometime with convulsion. Red skin rashes will appear all over the body after the fever disappeared in 3 to 5 days. Subsequently, rashes will resolve after 1 to 2 days. This condition often results from contraction of epidemic toxins.

V002-N00500.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00500.label: 假麻
V002-N00500.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00500.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00500.label: 奶麻
V002-N00500.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00500.label: 奶麻
V002-N00500.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00500.definition: 以哺乳期婴儿骤起高热，热退后肌肤出现玫 瑰色细散皮疹为主要表现的急性出疹性疾 病。

V002-N00500.label: 奶麻
V002-N00500.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00500.definition: 是婴幼儿时期一种急性出疹性疾病。以突然高热，持续3~4天后体温骤降，同时出疹为特征。

V002-N00502.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00502.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00502.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00502.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00502.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜儿科时行病
V002-N00502.definition: 感受痢疾时邪疫毒，以发病急骤，高热，烦躁口渴，大便脓血，甚或神昏抽搐，肢厥为主要表现的小儿中毒痢疾。

V002-N00502.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00502.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00502.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00502.definition: An epidemic condition characterized by sudden high fever, restlessness, intense abdominal pain, and stools containing pus and blood. In severe cases, convulsions, shock and cold limbs may be present. Often occurs when epidemic damp heat damages the intestines or enters the pericardium and triggers liver wind.

V002-N00502.label: 小儿疫毒痢
V002-N00502.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病

V002-N00503.label: 小儿白喉
V002-N00503.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00503.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00503.label: 小儿白喉
V002-N00503.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00503.definition: An epidemic condition characterized by fever, sore throat, white film (pseudo-membrane) build up in the throat or nose. The layer of pseudo-film coating is hard to crack, and can cause bleeding after peeling off. In severe cases, difficulty in swallowing, breathing or shock may be present. The condition often begins with lung and stomach bacterial infection spreading to the throat area.

V002-N00504.label: 小儿软脚瘟
V002-N00504.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00504.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00504.label: 小儿软脚瘟
V002-N00504.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00504.definition: An infectious condition that starts with fever, sweating, headache, nausea, vomiting and diarrhoea. The fever may subdue after a few days and reappear, accompanied by neck stiffness, bulging fontanelle, hyperesthesia, refusing to be touched or hugged, and restlessness or drowsiness. Over time, the muscles become weak, steps floppy and poorly controlled, and can even end with physical handicap. Often occurs when epidemic summer heat and dampness enters the gastrointestinal tract thereafter affecting muscles or obstructing meridians. Alternatively, it may occur due to lack of yin fluids after a long period of illness and malnourishment of sinews.

V002-N00505.label: 手足口病
V002-N00505.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿温疫类病

V002-N00505.label: 手足口病
V002-N00505.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科时行疾病
V002-N00505.definition: 是由感受手足口病时邪（柯萨奇病毒A组、B组及新肠道病毒71型）引起的急性发疹性传染病，临床以手掌足跖、臀及口腔疱疹，或伴发热为特征。

V002-N00506.label: 新生儿类病
V002-N00506.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语

V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第7部分 儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V002-N00507.definition: 手硬、足硬、颈硬、肉硬、腰硬的总称。

V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00507.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医儿科学｜新生儿疾病
V002-N00507.definition: 以手、足、头项、肌肤、腰冰冷僵硬，身体不温为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00507.definition: 以手、足、口、头项、肌肤冰冷僵硬，身体不温 为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00507.definition: 因小儿元阳不振，或寒凝血涩所致。以手、足、口、头项、肌肤冰冷僵硬，身体不温为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜小儿症状
V002-N00507.definition: 手、足、口、头项、肌肤冰冷僵硬

V002-N00507.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00507.label: 五硬
V002-N00507.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N00507.definition: stiffness of the hand, foot, waist, flesh and neck in the newborn due to a congenital defect

V002-N00508.label: 初生不乳
V002-N00508.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00508.label: 初生不乳
V002-N00508.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证
V002-N00508.definition: 因胎内患病、产伤、产时受寒、羊水秽血吸入腹内，或早产等所致。以婴儿不能吮乳为本要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00508.label: 初生不乳
V002-N00508.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜小儿症状
V002-N00508.definition: 婴儿出生12小时后，不能吮乳的表现。

V002-N00509.label: 初生不啼
V002-N00509.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00509.label: 初生不啼
V002-N00509.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证
V002-N00509.definition: 多因难产，或寒气内迫所致。以婴儿娩出后1～2min不能啼哭，或呼吸不利为主要表现的新中儿疾病。

V002-N00509.label: 初生不啼
V002-N00509.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜小儿症状
V002-N00509.definition: 婴儿出生后不能啼哭，或兼呼吸不利的表现。

V002-N00510.label: 初生儿呕吐
V002-N00510.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00510.label: 初生儿呕吐
V002-N00510.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证
V002-N00510.definition: 多因禀赋不足，或喂养不当所致。以婴儿于哺乳后呕吐乳食，甚至形体消瘦为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00511.label: 初生儿喘促
V002-N00511.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00511.label: 初生儿喘促
V002-N00511.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证
V002-N00511.definition: 因出生后感受外邪，或吸入秽毒等，使肺气郁闭所致。以婴儿不乳，或口吐白沫、喘憋、紫绀等为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00512.label: 初生儿泄泻
V002-N00512.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00514.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证

V002-N00514.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜小儿症状
V002-N00514.definition: 婴儿出生后24小时无胎便，尔后腹胀、呕吐粪水的表现。

V002-N00515.label: 初生小便不通
V002-N00515.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00515.label: 初生小便不通

V002-N00515.definition: 多因胎热蕴于膀胱，或禀赋不足，膀眈气化不行，或因肾缺如及尿道畸形等所致。以婴儿出生36h后仍无尿液排出为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00516.label: 胎怯
V002-N00516.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V002-N00516.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病因类｜胎传

V002-N00516.definition: 先天不足，以出生后形体消瘦，体重较轻，皮肤脆薄，毛发不生，形寒肢冷，面黄无华，目无精彩为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00516.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00516.label: 禀赋不足
V002-N00516.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V002-N00516.definition: Congenital constitutional weakness is an internal etiological factor of healthy qi deficiency.

V002-N00516.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00516.label: 胎弱
V002-N00516.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V002-N00516.definition: A collective term for a congenitally weak constitution and a deficiency of qi and blood. It is a major contributing factor to a deficiency of healthy qi.

V002-N00516.definition: 指先天体质虚弱，气血亏损，为发病的内在因素。

V002-N00516.label: 胎怯
V002-N00516.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜初生儿病证
V002-N00516.definition: 胎怯，是指新生儿体重低下，身材矮小，脏腑形气均未充实的一种病症。

V002-N00517.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00517.definition: Characterized by yellowish colouration of the skin, mucosa, and sclera of a newborn baby which lasts more than two weeks after birth. Often results from contraction of damp heat during pregnancy, biliary track deformation, or gall bile blockage.

V002-N00521.definition: 以唇青口撮、牙关紧闭，口噤反张，强直瘈疭为主要表现的新生儿疾病。

V002-N00521.definition: Characterized by cyanotic lips, lockjaw, and facial expression with an unnatural smile. In severe cases, tetanic convulsions and opisthotonus may be present. Often results from infection of the unhealed umbilical stump from wind-related pathogen.

V002-N00521.definition: 以新生儿唇青口撮，牙关紧闭，苦笑面容，全身强直性痉挛抽搐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00521.definition: a disease of the newborn characterized by cyanotic lips, lockjaw, generalized tonic spasm and tetanic convulsions, referring to neonatal tetanus

V002-N00522.label: 鹅口疮
V002-N00522.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N00522.definition: 以小儿口腔黏膜、舌头上布生白屑状物，状 如鹅口为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00522.label: 鹅口疮
V002-N00522.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医口齿科疾病｜口疮
V002-N00522.definition: 因感受邪毒，心脾积热，上熏口舌所致。以口腔、舌上出现片状白屑、状如鹅口为主要表现的口腔疾病。

V002-N00522.label: 鹅口疮
V002-N00522.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医儿科疾病｜儿科常见病证
V002-N00522.definition: 由胎热内蕴，口腔不洁，感受秽毒之邪所致，以口腔、舌上满布白屑为主要临床特征的一种口腔疾病。因其状如鹅口，故称鹅口疮；因其色白如雪片，故又名雪口。其主要病变在心脾。

V002-N00522.definition: a disease marked by white patches on the buccal mucosa and tongue

V002-N00523.label: 情志病类术语
V002-N00523.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病

V002-N00524.label: 卑惵

V002-N00524.label: 卑惵
V002-N00524.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜心病
V002-N00524.definition: 以神气衰颓，自卑怯懦，昌自羞愧，心常有歉，愧疚自责，重者自感有罪，他人错误也归自己，常欲赎罪；恐惧畏缩，惊避无地，爱居暗室等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00524.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00524.label: 卑惵
V002-N00524.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00524.definition: Characterized by depression, timidity, self-inferiority and panic. In severe cases, emotional detachment may be present. Often results from gallbladder deficiency, heart qi insufficiency or disquieted gallbladder qi.

V002-N00524.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00524.label: 卑惵
V002-N00524.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病
V002-N00524.definition: 因心气亏损，胆虚神怯，或气郁胆气不宁所致。以抑郁，胆怯，自卑，恐惧为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N00524.label: 卑惵
V002-N00524.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证
V002-N00524.definition: 因心气亏损，胆虚神怯，或气郁胆气不宁所致。以抑郁，胆怯，自卑（卑），恐惧（惵 ）为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V002-N00525.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V002-N00525.definition: 以妇女情志异常，精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无辜悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V002-N00525.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00525.definition: A paroxysmal mental disorder in women characterized by mood swings, mind wandering, sadness with no apparent reason, restlessness, crying or laughing with unexplained reason and frequent sighing. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi disorder and consumes heart blood and spleen qi. It may also occur as a result of yin–yang disorder due to menopause.

V002-N00525.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00525.definition: 以精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑 无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的情志疾病。

V002-N00525.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TF[中医精神疾病和心理学]｜中医精神疾病

V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜精神情志病类
V002-N00525.definition: 因情志不舒，郁火内扰，或天癸将绝之时，阴血亏虚，阴阳失调，气机紊乱，心神不宁所致。以神情抑郁，烦躁不宁，悲伤欲哭等为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00525.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00525.label: 脏躁
V002-N00525.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00525.definition: a paroxysmal mental disease marked by depression and melancholy, irritability, lack of control over emotions, sadness with an urge to weep, and sighing for no apparent reason

V002-N00526.label: 郁病
V002-N00526.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V002-N00526.label: 郁证
V002-N00526.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜精神情志病类

V002-N00526.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00526.label: 郁病
V002-N00526.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00526.definition: Characterized by a low mood, lack of interest, fullness and stuffiness in the chest and subcostal region, and a poor appetite. In severe cases, a sense of guilt, dejection, paranoia, self-harm and tendency to commit suicide. Often occurs when long-term emotional disturbance or character defects causes qi to stagnate. It is first associated with the liver and later with the heart and spleen.

Contributing factors may include mental stress, eating disorder, six exogenous pathogenic factors, pestilence, phlegm dampness, drug poisoning or food poisoning. These factors may block the flow of qi and cause the disorder of qi and blood.

matchedTerms: Syncope due to Disorder of Qi

V002-N00532.definition: 因精神刺激，情志不舒，气机郁闭所致。以突然昏厥，不知人事，或四肢厥冷、呼吸气粗、口噤握拳、舌苔薄白，脉伏或沉弦。

In severe cases, unconsciousness may be present. Often results from exposure to hot environment for a prolonged period or severe fire heat/summer heat damaging yin or disturbing the heart mind.

V002-N00534.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting or unconsciousness, phlegm sounds in the throat, cold limbs, and a deep, excessive, wiry and slippery pulse. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi to stagnate in the throat or when wind phlegm obstructs the airways adn blocks the heart mind.

V002-N00534.definition: 素有咳喘宿疾，多湿多痰，恼怒或剧烈咳嗽后突然昏倒，喉中有痰声，或呕吐涎沫，呼吸气粗，舌苔白腻，脉沉滑。病机为肝郁肺痹，痰随气升，上闭清窍。

V002-N00535.definition: Characterized by restlessness, vomiting, sleepiness, and panting. In severe cases, fainting and cold limbs may be present. It occurs when excessive alcohol drinking affects the heart mind.

V002-N00536.definition: 因不得进食，或饥而未食，致使营气不足，清阳不升，清空失养所致。临床以突发心慌，脱力软弱，冷汗不已，面色苍白，乃至晕厥等为特征的厥脱病。

V002-N00536.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00536.label: 食厥

Alternatively, it may occur when wind cold or anger triggers the stagnant food in the spleen and stomach and causes qi to ascend to disturb the heart mind.
