V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病

V002-N00546.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜厥病
V002-N00546.definition: 因恣饮暴食，或复感风寒，或因郁怒触动，食滞中焦，气逆上壅清空所致。临床以进食过多后昏厥，脘腹胀满，嗳酸吞腐，脉滑实等为特征的厥病。

V002-N00546.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00546.definition: 暴饮暴食而致食积内停，气机阻塞引起的厥证。

V002-N00546.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00546.definition: Characterized by fainting after over-eating, abdominal distension and fullness, belching and a slippery, forceful pulse. Often results from binge eating. Alternatively, it may occur when wind cold or anger triggers the stagnant food in the spleen and stomach and causes qi to ascend to disturb the heart mind.

V002-N00546.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00546.label: 饥厥
V002-N00546.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00546.definition: Characterized by sudden palpitations, weakness, cold sweats, a pale face and, in severe cases, sudden fainting may be present. Often results from failure of Ying nutrients to nourish the brain due to inability to eat food or hunger.

V002-N00546.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V002-N00546.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00546.definition: 因饥饿等而使营气不足，清阳不升，脑神失养所致。以突发心慌、软弱、冷汗、面白，甚至晕厥等为主要表现的厥病类疾病。

V002-N00546.label: 食厥
V002-N00546.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V002-N00546.definition: 因食填中脘，胃气不降，气逆于上，清窍闭阻而致，症见暴饮暴食，突然昏厥，脘腹胀满，呕呃酸腐，头晕，苔厚腻，脉滑。

V002-N00537.label: 尸厥
V002-N00537.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00537.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00537.label: 尸厥
V002-N00537.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00537.definition: 各种原因致脑神严重受损，以神志丧失，身体僵直，不能言动，二便失禁，其状若尸为特征的疾病。

V002-N00537.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00537.label: 尸厥
V002-N00537.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00537.definition: A severe condition characterized by loss of consciousness, impaired ability to speak, faint breathing, body rigor, and bowel and bladder incontinence. Contributing factors may include medical conditions, poisoning or traumatic injuries. These factors may cause separation between yin and yang and damage to the Yuan-primordial qi.

V002-N00537.label: 尸厥
V002-N00537.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00537.definition: 因各种原因致脑神严重受损。以神识丧失，身体僵直，不能言动，二便失禁，其状若尸为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V002-N00538.label: 脱病
V002-N00538.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00538.label: 脱证
V002-N00538.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜证候｜其他证候类术语

V002-N00538.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V002-N00538.label: 脱证
V002-N00538.path: GB T 16751.2-2021 中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候｜其他证候类术语
V002-N00538.definition: 泛指因各种原因严重耗损气血阴阳，阴阳离决、暴脱而亡所引起，以神昏、口开，手撒、肢冷，二便失禁等为特征的一类危重证候。注：包括气脱证、血脱证、亡阳证、亡阴证等。

V002-N00538.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00538.label: 脱病
V002-N00538.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症
V002-N00538.definition: 正气外脱，以神志淡漠，甚则昏迷，气息微弱，面色苍白，四肢厥冷，大汗淋漓，口开手撒，二便失禁，脉微细欲绝微主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00538.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00538.label: 脱证
V002-N00538.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V002-N00538.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting or clouding of consciousness, limb flaccidity, open hands, cold limbs and profuse sweating. In severe cases, body sweats with a cold sensation, bowel and bladder incontinence and a limp tongue may be present. The tongue is dark purple with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is deep and delayed or deep and feeble. This pattern often results from exhaustion of Yuan-primordial qi and mental cloudiness.

V002-N00538.label: 脱证
V002-N00538.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00538.definition: 以神志淡漠，甚则昏迷，气息微弱，大汗淋 漓，口开手撒，脉微细欲绝为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N00538.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00538.label: 脱证
V002-N00538.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚证
V002-N00538.definition: 突然昏仆，不省人事，目合口张，鼻鼾息微，手撒肢冷，汗多，大小便自遗，肢体软瘫，舌痿，脉细弱或脉微欲绝。

V002-N00538.label: 脱证
V002-N00538.path: 临床术语｜病证｜证候｜八纲证候｜虚实证候｜虚证
V002-N00538.definition: 以神志淡漠，甚则昏迷，气息微弱，大汗淋 漓，口开手撒，脉微细欲绝为常见症的证候。

V002-N00539.label: 气脱病
V002-N00539.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病机学｜气血失调｜气失调｜气虚
V002-N00539.definition: 气虚至极无以固摄，真气外泄的病理变化。

V002-N00539.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜中医基础理论术语｜病机类
V002-N00539.definition: A pathological state in which extreme deficiency of qi causes qi to float on the exterior of the body.

V002-N00539.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病机

V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中医基础理论｜病机
V002-N00539.definition: 由于邪气太盛，正气骤伤；或长期损耗，正气衰竭；或大汗、大吐、大出血致气随液脱、气随血脱等原因，导致气不内守而外选脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00539.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜气病
V002-N00539.definition: 真气因某种原因而急骤外泄，以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌淡脉细数为常见症的危重证候。

V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜气失调
V002-N00539.definition: 指气不内守，大量向外亡失，以致生命机能突然衰竭的一种病理状态。

V002-N00539.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00539.label: 气脱
V002-N00539.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜基础理论｜病机类
V002-N00539.definition: desertion of qi due to sudden damage to the healthy qi, massive loss of blood, profuse sweating, excessive vomiting and diarrhea, or due to prolonged consumption in a chronic disease

V002-N00540.label: 液脱病
V002-N00540.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00540.label: 液脱
V002-N00540.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病机学｜伤筋
V002-N00540.definition: 人体津液极度亏损而致形体？瘦，脏腑生理功能衰微，甚则生命垂危的病理变化。

V002-N00540.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00540.label: 液脱
V002-N00540.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病机

V002-N00540.label: 液脱
V002-N00540.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中医基础理论｜病机
V002-N00540.definition: 由于汗、吐、下损伤津液，造成阴液脱失的病理变化。

V002-N00540.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00540.label: 津液亏虚
V002-N00540.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病
V002-N00540.definition: 津液亏少，脏腑组织失却濡养，以口燥咽干、唇焦或裂、渴欲饮水、小便短少、大便干结、舌红少津、脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00540.label: 液脱
V002-N00540.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜津液失常｜津液不足
V002-N00540.definition: 指人体阴液极度亏损而致形体羸瘦，脏腑生理功能衰微，甚则生命垂危的病理变化。

V002-N00540.label: 液脱
V002-N00540.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00540.definition: 因津液大量急剧耗失，以致阴亏脉陷，气阴欲脱。以口渴无尿，肤燥脉微，血压显著降低为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V002-N00541.label: 精脱病
V002-N00541.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00541.label: 精脱
V002-N00541.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病机学｜脏腑病机｜五脏病机｜肾系病机
V002-N00541.definition: 肾精亏损，甚则脱失，官窍失养的病理变化。

V002-N00541.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00541.label: 精脱
V002-N00541.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病机

V002-N00541.label: 精脱
V002-N00541.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中医基础理论｜病机
V002-N00541.definition: 过劳伤精耗气，导致肾中精气亏损脱失，它窍失养的病理变化。

V002-N00541.label: 精脱
V002-N00541.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜精失调

V002-N00541.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00541.label: 精脱
V002-N00541.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜基础理论｜病机类
V002-N00541.definition: a pathological change characterized by depletion and loss of kidney essence that leads to impaired hearing

V002-N00542.label: 血脱病
V002-N00542.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病｜脱病

V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病机学｜气血失调｜血失调
V002-N00542.definition: 出血而致血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00542.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症
V002-N00542.definition: 突然大量失血，或长期反复出血，血脉空虚，气血欲脱，以出血，面色苍白，头晕目眩，心悸怔仲，气微而短，四肢厥冷，渐至神志昏蒙，舌淡白，脉微或芤，或微细欲绝，血压持续下降，低于90/60mmHg等为特征的脱病。

V002-N00542.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病机

V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中医基础理论｜病机
V002-N00542.definition: 各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00542.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病
V002-N00542.definition: 突然大量出血或长期反复出血，血液亡脱于外，以面色苍白、头晕眼花、心悸怔忡、气微而短、四肢清冷、舌淡脉芤等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜气血精津液病机｜血失调
V002-N00542.definition: 指各种急性大出血，导致的血海空虚，血液脱失的危重病理变化。

V002-N00542.label: 血脱
V002-N00542.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00542.definition: 因突然大量失血，以致血脉空虚，全身失却血液濡养，气血欲脱。以出血，面色苍白，脉微或芤，血压显著降低为主要表现的脱病类疾病。

V002-N00542.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00542.label: 亡血
V002-N00542.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜基础理论｜病机类
V002-N00542.definition: acute critical deficiency of blood, mostly due to massive hemorrhage, also called blood desertion

V002-N00543.label: 薄厥
V002-N00543.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00543.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00543.label: 薄厥
V002-N00543.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00543.definition: 因暴怒等精神刺激致血随气上逆，以突然发生的眩晕、头痛，烦躁不安，偏身麻木，甚则神志不清，汗出、息促等为特征的厥证。

V002-N00543.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00543.label: 薄厥
V002-N00543.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00543.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, intense headache, high blood pressure, restlessness, a red face, numbness on one side of the body, and tremor of the limbs. In severe cases, vomiting of blood, mental cloudiness, sweating and rapid breathing may be present. Often occurs when emotions like sudden rage cause hyperactivity of liver yang and disordered qi and blood.

V002-N00543.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00543.label: 薄厥
V002-N00543.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00543.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00543.label: 中风
V002-N00543.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肝胆病
V002-N00543.definition: 因气血逆乱、脑脉痹阻或血溢于脑所致。以昏仆、半身不遂、肢体麻木、舌蹇不语等为主要表现的脑神疾病。

V002-N00543.label: 中风
V002-N00543.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肝胆病证
V002-N00543.definition: 是由于气血逆乱，产生风、火、痰、瘀，导致脑脉痹阻或血溢脑脉之外。临床以突然昏仆、半身不遂、口舌歪斜、言语蹇涩或不语、偏身麻木为主症。依据脑髓神机受损程度的不同，有中经络、中脏腑之分，临床表现为不同证候。

V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00544.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症｜厥证
V002-N00544.definition: 失血过多，神明失养或血随气升，上冲清窍所致的厥证。

V002-N00544.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00544.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, a pale face, cold limbs and transient mental cloudiness. Contributing factors may include nervousness, fear, intense traumatic pain, ageing or a sudden change in posture. These factors may disturb qi activity and result in the failure of blood to nourish the brain.

V002-N00544.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病

V002-N00544.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜心病｜厥证
V002-N00544.definition: 因情绪紧张、恐惧，或因创伤剧痛，或为年老体弱，或在突然改变体位等情况下，导致一时气机紊乱，脉络弛缓，清阳不升，脑失血养。以突然昏倒、面白肢厥、神识不清为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V002-N00544.label: 血厥
V002-N00544.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜心系病证｜厥证
V002-N00544.definition: 多因急躁恼怒而发，突然昏倒，不知人事，牙关紧闭，面赤唇紫，舌暗红，脉弦有力。病机为怒而气上，血随气升，蒙闭清窍。

V002-N00545.label: 风厥
V002-N00545.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜厥脱类病

V002-N00545.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00545.label: 风厥
V002-N00545.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00545.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, palpitations, difficulty breathing, cold limbs, a feeble pulse, skin itching, low blood pressure and mental cloudiness. Often results from wind disturbing or blocking qi and blood or yang qi collapse.

V002-N00545.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00545.label: 风厥
V002-N00545.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00545.label: 风厥
V002-N00545.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00545.definition: 因风毒突致，扰乱气血，阴阳乖戾，气机阻闭，甚至阳气欲脱。以胸闷心悸，呼吸困难，肢厥脉微，皮肤瘙痒，血压降低，神志异常等为主要表现的厥、脱类疾病。

V002-N00547.label: 晕动病
V002-N00547.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00547.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00547.label: 晕动病
V002-N00547.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00547.definition: Characterized by a pale face, dizziness, nausea and vomiting. The symptoms slowly decrease and then disappear once the motion has stopped. Contributing factors may include emotions, hunger/binge eating or disagreement between visually perceived movement and the vestibular system’s sense of movement. These factors may cause disordered qi and blood, allowing phlegm turbidity to ascend and disturb the mind.

V002-N00547.label: 晕动病
V002-N00547.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜脑系病证
V002-N00547.definition: 多由情志不畅，饮食饥饱失常，或禀赋气机不调，加之乘坐舟车运动，导致气血逆乱，痰浊上犯。以乘坐舟车时感疲乏眩晕、恶心呕吐为主要表现的眩晕类疾病。

V002-N00549.label: 正水
V002-N00549.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00549.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00549.label: 正水
V002-N00549.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N00549.definition: 以全身浮肿，尿少，腹满而喘等呈进行性发展为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00549.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00549.label: 正水
V002-N00549.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00549.definition: Characterized by progressive oedema of the whole body, scanty urine or urine retention, abdominal fullness and panting. Often occurs when retained water (due to yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney) affects the lung.

V002-N00549.label: 正水
V002-N00549.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N00549.definition: 以浮肿，尿少，血压高等呈进行性发展为主 要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00550.label: 皮水
V002-N00550.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00550.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00550.label: 皮水
V002-N00550.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N00550.definition: 水气泛溢皮肤，以全身浮肿，尿少，腹胀为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00550.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00550.label: 皮水
V002-N00550.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00550.definition: Characterized by generalized pitting oedema. In severe cases, bulging abdomen may be present. Associated signs and symptoms may include limb swelling or pain, chest tightness, a poor appetite, no aversion to wind, a white, greasy coating and a superficial pulse. Often occurs when turbid dampness obstructs the flow of spleen qi and causes water dampness to flow over the surface of the body.

V002-N00550.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00550.label: 皮水
V002-N00550.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00550.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00550.label: 里水
V002-N00550.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00550.label: 皮水
V002-N00550.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N00550.definition: 以新起浮肿，尿少，蛋白尿，血压高为主要表 现的水肿病。

V002-N00550.label: 皮水
V002-N00550.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00550.definition: 因风寒湿热毒邪侵袭，使肺失宣降，水道不利，水液潴留，以新起浮肿，尿少，蛋白尿，血压高为主要表现的水肿类疾病。

V002-N00551.label: 石水
V002-N00551.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00551.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00551.label: 石水
V002-N00551.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N00551.definition: 以 反复发作的腹部胀痛而硬，全身水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00551.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00551.label: 石水
V002-N00551.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00551.definition: Characterized by recurrent oedema, hardness of the lower abdomen, distending pain in the subcostal region, abdominal fullness, absence of panting, a bright pale complexion and a deep pulse. Individuals may also have persistent proteinuria and hypertension. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors trigger the retained water dampness in the lower jiao (due to chronic wind oedema and skin oedema).

V002-N00551.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00551.label: 石水
V002-N00551.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00551.label: 石水
V002-N00551.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N00551.definition: 以反复发作的浮肿，蛋白尿，血压高，面白为 主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00551.label: 石水
V002-N00551.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00551.definition: 因皮水等迁延日久，正气渐虚所致。以反复发作的浮肿，蛋白尿，血压高，面白为主要表现的水种类疾病

V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00552.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N00552.definition: 外邪侵袭，腠理闭塞，或气机不畅而致水液泛滥，以面部先肿，肿势明显，按之凹陷即起，病体不虚等为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00552.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00552.definition: Characterized by an acute onset of pitting swelling of the face and eyelid. Associated symptoms may include fever and aversion to wind, with no body weakness. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors block the skin pores, obstruct the flow of qi and result in water dampness.

V002-N00552.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N00552.definition: 以面部先肿，肿势明显，按之凹陷即起，病体 不虚为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00552.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液内停｜水证｜水肿
V002-N00552.definition: 头面先肿，继及全身，腰以上肿甚，多属外感风邪，肺失宣降，风水相搏所致。

V002-N00552.label: 阳水
V002-N00552.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00552.definition: 风邪袭表，肺气闭塞，通调失职，风遏水阻，以眼睑浮肿，继则全身及四肢皆肿，来势迅速，多有恶寒，发热，肢节酸楚，小便不利等症为主的疾病。

V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00553.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N00553.definition: 五脏虚衰，气化失司而致水液停蓄所致，以面浮足肿，或下肢先肿，肿势难消，按之凹陷不易恢复为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00553.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00553.definition: Characterized by a gradual onset of facial puffiness, and pitting foot or leg swelling. Often occurs when water dampness (due to deficiency of the five zang organs) flow over the surface of the body.

V002-N00553.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N00553.definition: 以面浮足肿，或下肢先肿，肿势难消，按之凹 陷不易恢复为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00553.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜津液病｜津液内停｜水证｜水肿
V002-N00553.definition: 足跗或下肢先肿，继及全身，腰以下肿甚，多由阳气虚衰，蒸化无力，以致水湿内停，外渗肌肤而成。

V002-N00553.label: 阴水
V002-N00553.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00553.definition: 脾阳不振，运化无权，土不制水，以身肿日久，腰以下为甚，按之凹陷不易恢复，脘腹胀闷，纳减便溏，面色不华，神疲乏力，四肢倦怠，小便短少，舌质淡，苔白腻或白滑，脉沉缓或沉弱为主症的疾病。

V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V002-N00554.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N00554.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部即四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类｜水肿

V002-N00554.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00554.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, aversion to wind, sore, swollen throat, joint pain, and swelling of the face and eyelid. Over time, individuals may experience generalized oedema. Associated signs and symptoms may include shortness of breath, scanty urine, proteinuria and elevated blood pressure. If often occurs when pathogenic wind affects the lung’s functions in dispersing and descending qi and regulating water passage.

V002-N00554.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N00554.definition: 以突发局限性水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00554.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜病因证候｜外感病证｜六淫证候｜风淫证候
V002-N00554.definition: 外感风邪，肺卫失宣，水湿浸淫肌肤，以突起眼睑、头面、四肢水肿，或起风团肿块，微恶风寒，小便短少，脉浮等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00554.label: 风水
V002-N00554.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜水肿
V002-N00554.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部及四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V002-N00555.label: 汗类病
V002-N00555.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00555.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00555.label: 汗类病
V002-N00555.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00555.definition: A group of conditions caused by disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence upon invasion by exogenous pathogenic wind, cold, and summer heat and dampness. Alternatively, they may also result from insecurity of the skin pores due to deficiency of the zang–-fu organs. These include spontaneous sweating, night sweats, yellow sweating and bloody sweating.

V002-N00555.label: 汗证
V002-N00555.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00555.definition: 以全身或局部非正常出汗为主要表现的疾 病的统称。

V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00556.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00556.definition: Characterized by episodes of sweating during sleep that stop after waking up and are not related to external environmental factors. Most commonly caused by internal heat due to yin deficiency or damp heat opening the skin pores.

V002-N00556.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V002-N00556.label: 盗汗病
V002-N00556.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00556.definition: 以盗汗为主要表现的汗证。

V002-N00556.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V002-N00556.definition: 睡时汗出、醒后汗止的汗出异常症状。常因阴血不足，湿阻气机等所致。痨病、佝偻病和外感温热病恢复期多有盗汗。

V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜汗证
V002-N00556.definition: 寐中汗出，醒来自止者，称为盗汗，亦称为寝汗。

V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00556.definition: 入睡后出汗，醒来即止的表现。

V002-N00556.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00556.label: 盗汗
V002-N00556.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N00556.definition: sweating during sleep that ceases on awakening

V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00557.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00557.definition: Characterized by persistent, spontaneous day sweating that is not attributed to physical exertion, hot weather, wearing too many clothes or taking diaphoretics. It is mostly commonly caused by disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence or qi failing to secure the yin fluids.

V002-N00557.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V002-N00557.label: 自汗病
V002-N00557.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00557.definition: 以自汗为主要表现的汗证。

V002-N00557.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V002-N00557.definition: 不因劳累、炎热、衣着过暧、服用发汗药等因素而时时汗出、动辄益甚的汗出异常症状。营卫不和、表虚不固、正气外越等为自汗的常见原因。引起自汗的常见疾病有虚劳类、脱病类疾病，中暑、瘿气等。

V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜汗证
V002-N00557.definition: 不因外界环境的影响，而白昼时时汗出，动辄益甚者，称为自汗。

V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00557.definition: 不因劳累活动，不因天热及穿衣过暖和服用发散药物等因素而自然汗出的表现。

V002-N00557.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00557.label: 自汗
V002-N00557.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N00557.definition: excessive sweating during the daytime with no apparent cause such as physical exertion, hot weather, thick clothing or medication

V002-N00558.label: 血汗
V002-N00558.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00558.label: 血汗
V002-N00558.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00558.definition: Characterized by red coloured sweats, along with symptoms due to fire-heat or deficiency of qi and blood. Contributing factors may include exogenous fire heat affecting the surface of the body, fire hyperactivity of the heart, liver and stomach, or deficiency of qi and blood.

V002-N00558.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N00558.definition: 血液瘀积于肌肤之间，皮肤表现青紫斑点或斑块的病证，也称紫斑。

V002-N00558.label: 汗血
V002-N00558.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常
V002-N00558.definition: 属于问汗所见。是指汗出色淡红如血而言。

V002-N00559.label: 黄汗
V002-N00559.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜汗类病

V002-N00559.definition: Characterized by yellow-coloured sweating that contaminates cloth. It is often caused by disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence or external contraction of damp heat.

V002-N00559.definition: 以汗出色黄染衣为主要表现的汗证。

V002-N00559.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00559.label: 黄汗
V002-N00559.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜汗证
V002-N00559.definition: 因营卫不畅或外感湿热之邪所致。以汗出色黄染衣为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00560.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00560.definition: A group of disorders characterized by polydipsia, polyphagia and polyuria. Contributing factors include overeating of oily, sweet food, emotions, sexual indulgence, exposure to pathogenic warm heat or abuse of medicinal minerals. These factors may cause stomach heat, lung dryness, hyperactive heart fire to consume yin and disturb qi transformation.

V002-N00565.definition: Characterized by obesity with recent weight loss and a decreased appetite, bowel sounds, and loose stools. Associated symptoms may include palpitations, shortness of breath and vomiting of foamy saliva. Often results from fluid retention in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00565.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00565.label: 痰饮类病
V002-N00565.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00565.definition: Water retention in certain body parts due to dysfunction of the lung, spleen and kidney.

V002-N00565.label: 痰饮（疾病）
V002-N00565.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病

V002-N00569.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00569.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N00569.label: 痰饮类病
V002-N00569.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜气血津液病类术语
V002-N00569.definition: 泛指因肺、脾、肾功能失调，体内水液不得输化，停留或渗注于身体某部位而发生的一类疾病。

V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V002-N00569.definition: 脏腑气化失司，水液代谢障碍所形成的病理产物。属继发性致病因素。

V002-N00569.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00569.definition: Characterized by obesity with recent weight loss and a decreased appetite, bowel sounds, and loose stools. Associated symptoms may include palpitations, shortness of breath and vomiting of foamy saliva. Often results from fluid retention in the stomach and intestines.

V002-N00569.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00569.label: 痰饮类病
V002-N00569.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00569.definition: Water retention in certain body parts due to dysfunction of the lung, spleen and kidney.

V002-N00569.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中医基础理论｜病因
V002-N00569.definition: 痰与饮的合称，脏腑病变过程中渗出并积存于体内的清理产物，可阻碍气血运行而成为继发的致病因素。

V002-N00569.label: 痰饮（疾病）
V002-N00569.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病

V002-N00569.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因
V002-N00569.definition: 机体水液代谢障碍所形成的病理产物，这种病理产物形成之后，作为一种致病因素作用于机体，阻滞经络，阻碍气血，影响脏腑，从而引起各种复杂的病理变化，导致各种新的病证出现。

V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病因｜病理产物
V002-N00569.definition: 指机体水液代谢障碍所形成的质地黏稠的病理产物。属继发性致病因素。

V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00569.definition: 多因素体脾虚，运化无力，复加饮食失节，或因感受湿邪，致脾阳受损，水湿失运，停于胃肠引起。主要表现是心下满闷，呕吐清水痰涎，胃肠沥沥有声。

V002-N00569.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00569.label: 痰饮
V002-N00569.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜基础理论｜病因类
V002-N00569.definition: a combination of phlegm and retained fluid as an entity to cause disease, also called phlegm-fluid retention

V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00566.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肺病
V002-N00566.definition: 饮邪停留于胁肋部，以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肺系病类

V002-N00566.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00566.definition: Characterized by fullness, distension and tightness in the chest or subcostal region and cough-induced pain. Often occurs when fluid retention in the chest cavity (due to lung tuberculosis/cancer or other systemic conditions) obstructs the flow of qi.

V002-N00566.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V002-N00566.definition: 饮邪停留于胁胁部引起的，以胸胁饱满、胀 闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00566.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V002-N00566.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00566.label: 悬饮
V002-N00566.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00566.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00567.label: 支饮
V002-N00567.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00567.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00567.label: 支饮
V002-N00567.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00567.definition: Characterized by coughing, panting, chest fullness with an inability to lie flat, shortness of breath and foamy sputum. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, a cold sensation in the back, back pain, facial puffiness, and leg oedema. Often occurs when retained thoracic fluid affects the lung. In addition, it is commonly triggered by external wind cold or eating cold/cool food.

V002-N00567.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00567.label: 支饮
V002-N00567.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00567.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00567.label: 支饮
V002-N00567.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V002-N00567.definition: 因感染痨虫，或感受温热、湿热等邪，郁而不解，入侵心包之络，或因肾衰水毒上泛，损伤心包，以胸痛，气喘，心包腔积液等为主要表现的痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00567.label: 支饮
V002-N00567.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00567.definition: 因感染痨虫，或感受温热、湿热等邪，郁而不解，入侵心包之络，或因肾衰水毒上泛，损伤心包。以胸痛，气喘，心包腔积液等为主要表现的痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00568.label: 溢饮
V002-N00568.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V002-N00568.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00568.label: 溢饮
V002-N00568.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00568.definition: Characterized by facial puffiness and leg or generalized pitting oedema, and body heaviness. Associated symptoms may include cold intolerance, panting, coughing and a dry mouth with no desire to drink water. Often occurs when water retention (due to spleen deficiency) flows over the surface of the body or when exogenous wind cold blocks the flow of lung qi.

V002-N00568.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00568.label: 溢饮
V002-N00568.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00568.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00568.label: 溢饮
V002-N00568.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医病因和病机｜中医病因｜痰饮｜饮证
V002-N00568.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，导致饮邪停积胸腔，阻碍气机升降。以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为主要表现的胸部痰饮类疾病。

V002-N00568.label: 溢饮
V002-N00568.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00568.definition: 因饮食不节，或情志失调，年高体弱，阳气素虚等，使脾失健运，肾失开合，气机阻滞，水湿内停。以头面、下肢或全身浮肿，畏冷，乏力等为主要表现的水肿类疾病。

V002-N00570.label: 蓄血病
V002-N00570.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00571.label: 虚劳类病
V002-N00571.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00571.label: 虚劳
V002-N00571.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜气血津液病

V002-N00571.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00571.label: 虚劳类病
V002-N00571.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00571.definition: A collective term for chronic deficiency or consumption of qi, blood, yin, yang and the five zang organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, an improper diet, emotions, alcohol consumption, sexual indulgence or major medical conditions.

V002-N00571.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00571.label: 虚劳
V002-N00571.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N00571.label: 虚劳
V002-N00571.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00571.definition: 阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损的慢性虚衰性疾病的 统称。

V002-N00571.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00571.label: 虚劳
V002-N00571.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00571.definition: 劳逸失度而伤人致病，常渐积而发，起病徐缓，逐渐加重，病程较长，伤及脏腑气血为主，其次可伤及筋肉、经络及关节，多表现为虚证和慢性病。

V002-N00571.label: 虚劳
V002-N00571.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00571.definition: 又称虚损，是以脏腑功能衰退，气血阴阳不足为主要病机的多种慢性虚弱症候的总称。

V002-N00572.label: 内伤发热病
V002-N00572.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00572.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00572.label: 内伤发热病
V002-N00572.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00572.definition: Characterized by a low-grade fever, tidal fever, bone-steaming sensation, hot flashes and feverish sensations of the palms and soles. Individuals may also present with symptoms indicative of deficiency of yin, yang, qi, blood and the zang–fu organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, emotional disturbance, improper diet or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs. These factors may cause deficiency of qi and blood and disharmony between yin and yang.

V002-N00573.label: 虚损病
V002-N00573.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00574.label: 血劳
V002-N00574.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00574.label: 血劳
V002-N00574.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00574.definition: 因先后天亏损，血液生化不足，或因失血、溶血等耗伤血液，以致营血亏少，脏器失其濡养。以面白舌淡，眩晕心悸，血红细胞少，血红蛋白量低为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00575.label: 髓劳
V002-N00575.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜虚劳类病

V002-N00575.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00575.label: 髓劳
V002-N00575.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00575.definition: Characterized by haemorrhage, anaemia and deficiency of whole blood cells. Contributing factors may include heredity, postnatal malnutrition or exposure to drugs or certain chemicals.

V002-N00575.label: 髓劳
V002-N00575.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证
V002-N00575.definition: 因先后天不足，精血生化无源，或因有毒药物及理化因素伤正，邪毒淤阻，新血不生。以出血，血亏，全血细胞减少，易染邪毒为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N00576.label: 血溢类病
V002-N00576.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V002-N00576.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00576.label: 血溢类病
V002-N00576.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00576.definition: A group of conditions caused by the failure of qi to hold blood within the vessels or hyperactive fire (due to yin deficiency) forces blood to move recklessly. They include haemoptysis, nosebleed, bloody stools or purpura.

V002-N00576.label: 血溢病
V002-N00576.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00576.definition: 因禀赋不足，或后天损伤，气虚不能摄血，或阴虚火旺，迫血妄行所致。以容易出现持久难止的出血为主要表现的出血类疾病。

V002-N00577.label: 紫癜病
V002-N00577.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜血溢类病

V002-N00577.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00577.label: 葡萄疫
V002-N00577.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜热病
V002-N00577.definition: 以遍体皮肤出现大小青紫斑点，色若葡萄等为特征的瘟疫。

V002-N00577.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00577.label: 紫癜病
V002-N00577.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00577.definition: A condition characterized by red or purple discoloured (grape-shaped) spots on the skin or mucosa that do not blanch on applying pressure, especially on the leg. In severe cases, it may affect the zang–fu organs. Contributing factors may include congenital weakness, heat accumulating in the zang–fu organs, allergic reactions to food or medicine, blood heat damaging blood collaterals, or the spleen failing to control blood within the small vessels.

V002-N00577.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00577.label: 葡萄疫
V002-N00577.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N00577.label: 紫癜
V002-N00577.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V002-N00577.definition: 以皮肤黏膜出现紫斑为主要表现的血证。

V002-N00577.label: 紫斑
V002-N00577.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证
V002-N00577.definition: 血液溢出于肌肤之间，皮肤表现青紫斑点或斑块的病症，称为紫斑。亦有称为肌衄及葡萄疫者。

V002-N00577.label: 紫癜病
V002-N00577.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜气血津液病证｜血证

V002-N00578.definition: Characterized by fresh blood in stools. Individuals may also have haemorrhoids. Contributing factors may include retained wind cold or toxic heat in the large intestine, damp heat accumulating in the stomach and intestines or qi failing to keep blood within the vessels.

V002-N00583.definition: Characterized by the passing of urine through the anus or passing of faeces through the urethra. It is often caused by a trauma-induced fistula or abnormal connection between the rectum and the vagina during childbirth.

V002-N00594.label: 产后尿血

V002-N00594.definition: 以产后小便中混有血液，而无疼痛感为特征的产后病。

V002-N00594.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00594.label: 产后尿血
V002-N00594.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜产后病
V002-N00594.definition: 以产后小便中混有血液，而无疼痛之感为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00594.label: 产后尿血
V002-N00594.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00594.definition: 以产后小便中混有血液，而无疼痛之感为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00595.label: 产后恶血冲心
V002-N00595.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00595.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00595.label: 产后恶血冲心
V002-N00595.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00595.definition: Characterized by restlessness, insomnia, mental confusion and incoherent speech after childbirth. In severe cases, loss of consciousness may be present. Often results from deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi and retained lochia disturbing the heart mind.

V002-N00595.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00595.label: 败血冲心
V002-N00595.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00595.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00595.label: 产后三冲
V002-N00595.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医产科病｜产褥期疾病
V002-N00595.definition: 指产后恶露当下不下，逆而上行，引起的三种危重证候，即败血冲心、败血冲肺、败血冲胃。

V002-N00596.label: 产后恶血冲肺
V002-N00596.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00596.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00596.label: 产后恶血冲肺
V002-N00596.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00596.definition: Characterized by cough, rapid breathing, chest tightness, restlessness, a red or dark complexion and nosebleed after childbirth. In severe cases, panting or a feeling of impending death may be present. Often occurs when retained lochia affects the lung.

V002-N00597.label: 产后恶血冲胃
V002-N00597.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00597.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00597.label: 产后恶血冲胃
V002-N00597.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00597.definition: Characterized by colicky abdominal pain that radiates to the waist, coupled with nausea, vomiting, abdominal stuffiness and a poor appetite after childbirth. Often results from deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi and retained lochia affecting the stomach.

V002-N00598.label: 产后恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00598.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00598.label: 恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00598.definition: 以分娩后恶露蓄积胞中，停滞不下，或下亦甚少，小腹疼痛为特征的产后病。

V002-N00598.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00598.label: 产后恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00598.definition: Caharaterized by retained vaginal discharge during the postpartum period. Lower abdominal pain may also be present. Often results from build up of lochia in the uterus.

V002-N00598.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00598.label: 恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜产后病
V002-N00598.definition: 以分娩后恶露蓄积胞中，停留不下，或下亦甚少，小腹疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00598.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00598.label: 产后三冲
V002-N00598.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医产科病｜产褥期疾病
V002-N00598.definition: 指产后恶露当下不下，逆而上行，引起的三种危重证候，即败血冲心、败血冲肺、败血冲胃。

V002-N00598.label: 产后恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜产后病
V002-N00598.definition: 多因血瘀所致。以胎盘娩出后，胞宫内的余血浊液停留不下，或下亦甚少，并伴小腹疼痛等症为主要表现的产后疾病。

V002-N00598.label: 产后恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜产中产后症状

V002-N00598.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00598.label: 恶露不下
V002-N00598.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科

V002-N00599.label: 产后恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00599.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00599.label: 恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00599.definition: 以产后血性恶露持续10天以上，扔淋漓不净为主要特征的产后病。

V002-N00599.label: 恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜产后病类

V002-N00599.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00599.label: 产后恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00599.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged discharge of lochia for more than 10 days after childbirth. Often results from blood heat, blood stasis, qi deficiency, or contraction of external pathogens.

V002-N00599.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00599.label: 恶露不尽
V002-N00599.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00599.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00599.label: 恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00599.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00599.label: 恶露不净
V002-N00599.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜产后病
V002-N00599.definition: 以产后恶露持续3周以上，仍淋漓不尽为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00599.label: 恶露不净
V002-N00599.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00599.definition: 以产后恶露持续3周以上，仍淋漓不尽为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00599.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00599.label: 恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医产科病｜产褥期疾病
V002-N00599.definition: 多因血热、血瘀、气虚，气血运行失常，或感染邪毒所致。以恶露持续3周以上仍淋漓不净为主要表现的产后疾病。

V002-N00599.label: 产后恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜产后病
V002-N00599.definition: 产后血性恶露持续10天以上，仍淋漓不尽者，称为“产后恶露不绝”。

V002-N00599.label: 恶漏不断
V002-N00599.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜产中产后症状
V002-N00599.definition: 属于产后病症状。产后由阴道排出的瘀浊败血，称为恶漏，一般应在产后20天左右排尽，若持续3周以上，仍淋漓不净者，为恶漏不断。

V002-N00599.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00599.label: 恶露不绝
V002-N00599.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00599.definition: abnormally prolonged discharge of lochia for more than 3 weeks after childbirth, the same as lochiorrhea

V002-N00600.label: 产后汗病
V002-N00600.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00600.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00600.label: 产后汗病
V002-N00600.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00600.definition: Characterized by spontaneous sweating or night sweats after childbirth.

V002-N00601.label: 产后盗汗
V002-N00601.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病｜产后汗病

V002-N00601.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00601.label: 产后盗汗
V002-N00601.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00601.definition: 以产后睡眠中汗出湿衣，醒来自止为特征的产后病。

V002-N00601.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00601.label: 产后盗汗
V002-N00601.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医产科病｜产褥期疾病｜产后三急
V002-N00601.definition: 产妇睡寐中汗出湿衣、醒来即止者。

V002-N00601.label: 产后汗证
V002-N00601.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜产后病
V002-N00601.definition: 包括产后自汗、产后盗汗。产后气虚腠理不密，出现汗出不止，动则益甚者，为产后自汗。阴虚内热，出现睡时汗出，醒后即止者，为产后盗汗。

V002-N00602.label: 产后自汗
V002-N00602.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病｜产后汗病

V002-N00602.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00602.label: 产后自汗
V002-N00602.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00602.definition: 以产后清醒时汗出，不能自止，动则尤甚为特征的产后病。

V002-N00602.label: 产后汗证
V002-N00602.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜产后病
V002-N00602.definition: 包括产后自汗、产后盗汗。产后气虚腠理不密，出现汗出不止，动则益甚者，为产后自汗。阴虚内热，出现睡时汗出，醒后即止者，为产后盗汗。

V002-N00602.label: 产后多汗
V002-N00602.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜汗出异常｜多汗
V002-N00602.definition: 属于妇产科视诊所见的一种异常临床症状。新产气血较虚，腠理不密，故进食或睡眠时，汗出较多，常在分娩7-10天后自然减少或停止，这是产后正常得生理现象，如汗出过多或日久不止者，则为产后多汗。

V002-N00603.label: 产后痉病
V002-N00603.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00603.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00603.label: 产后痉病
V002-N00603.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00603.definition: 以新产后或产褥期内，产妇突然项背强直，四肢抽搐，甚则口噤不开，角弓反张为特征的产后病。

V002-N00603.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00603.label: 产后痉病
V002-N00603.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00603.definition: Characterized by muscle contractions, body rigidity, lockjaw or opisthotonos after childbirth. Often results from blood deficiency, yin deficiency or obstetric wound infection.

V002-N00603.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00603.label: 产后痉病
V002-N00603.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00603.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00603.label: 产后痉病
V002-N00603.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜产后病
V002-N00603.definition: 以新产后或产褥期内，突然项背强直，四肢抽搐，甚则口噤不开，角弓反张为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00604.label: 产后瘖
V002-N00604.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00604.label: 产后喑
V002-N00604.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜咽喉病
V002-N00604.definition: 以分娩后声音不扬，呈细哑或难以发育为主 要表现的咽喉疾病。

V002-N00605.label: 产后缺乳
V002-N00605.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00605.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00605.label: 缺乳
V002-N00605.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00605.definition: 以哺乳期内，产妇乳汁甚少，甚则全无为特征的产后病。

V002-N00605.label: 缺乳
V002-N00605.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜产后病类

V002-N00605.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00605.label: 产后缺乳
V002-N00605.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00605.definition: Characterized by insufficient or absent breastmilk during the lactation period. Often results from deficiency of qi and blood or liver qi stagnation.

V002-N00605.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00605.label: 乳汁不行
V002-N00605.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00605.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00605.label: 缺乳
V002-N00605.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00605.label: 缺乳
V002-N00605.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00605.definition: 以哺乳期内，产妇乳汁甚少，甚则全无为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N00605.label: 缺乳
V002-N00605.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜产后病
V002-N00605.definition: 哺乳期内，产妇乳汁甚少，或全无，称为“缺乳”。亦称“乳汁不行”，或“乳汁不足”。

V002-N00605.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00605.label: 乳汁不行
V002-N00605.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科

V002-N00605.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00605.label: 缺乳
V002-N00605.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00605.definition: deficiency of milk secretion during lactation, the same as hypogalactia

V002-N00606.label: 产后腹痛
V002-N00606.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00606.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00606.label: 产后腹痛
V002-N00606.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜产后病（总）
V002-N00606.definition: 以产妇在产褥期发生与分娩有关的小腹疼痛为特征的产后病。

V002-N00606.label: 儿枕痛
V002-N00606.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜产后病类

V002-N00606.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00606.label: 产后腹痛

V002-N00607.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00607.definition: Characterized by excessive vaginal bleeding following the birth of a baby. Often results from damage to the Chong and Ren meridians, retained placental or sex following childbirth.

V002-N00607.definition: 以产妇分娩后，突然阴道大量出血为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00607.definition: 以产妇分娩后，突然阴道大量出血为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N00607.definition: 产妇分娩后，突然阴道大量出血者，称为“产后血崩”。

V002-N00610.label: 产后血晕
V002-N00610.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V002-N00610.definition: 以产妇分娩后突然头晕眼花，不能起坐，心胸满闷，恶心呕吐，喘促气急，甚则神昏口噤，不省人事为特征的产后病。

V002-N00610.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00610.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of dizziness, blurred vision, an inability to sit up, chest fullness and stuffiness, nausea, vomiting, and profuse phlegm. In severe cases, unconsciousness and lockjaw may be present. Often results from qi collapse due to heavy blood loss or stasis obstructing the flow of qi.

V002-N00610.label: 产后血晕

V002-N00611.definition: 以产褥期内，出现肢体与关节酸痛、麻木、重 著为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00636.definition: Characterized by the inability of women of childbearing age to become pregnant after one year (or longer) of unprotected sex. Often results from dysfunctions of the uterus and Chong and Ren meridian. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, liver qi stagnation, phlegm dampness, and blood stasis.

V002-N00636.label: 不孕症

V002-N00636.definition: 女子婚后夫妇同居1年以上，配偶生殖功能正常，未避孕而未受孕者；或曾孕育过，未避孕又1年以上未再受孕者，称为“不孕症”。前者称“原发性不孕症”，后者称“继发性不孕症”。古称前者为“全不产”，后者为“断绪”。

V002-N00642.label: 带下
V002-N00642.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V002-N00642.definition: 妇女阴道分泌物明显增多，色、质、气味异常的症状。寒湿或湿热下注，或热毒浸淫，或脾肾阳气亏虚等常可见带下异常。带下一般见于女阴局部感染邪毒，或胞宫等的病变。但身体虚弱或痰湿内盛者亦可见带下量多。

V002-N00642.label: 带下病
V002-N00642.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病
V002-N00642.definition: 带下的量明显增多，色、质、气味发生异常，或伴全身、局部症状者，称为“带下病”

V002-N00642.label: 带下
V002-N00642.path: 临床术语｜诊察对象｜问诊对象

V002-N00642.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00642.label: 带下
V002-N00642.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00642.definition: (1) normal discharge from the vagina; (2) diseases characterized by discharge from the vagina, the same as leukorrhea

V002-N00643.label: 五色带
V002-N00643.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜带下病

V002-N00643.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00643.label: 五色带
V002-N00643.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜带下病
V002-N00643.definition: 以带下五色杂下，腐臭难闻或赤白相杂，或如洗肉水样为常见症的带下病。

V002-N00643.label: 五色带
V002-N00643.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00643.definition: 以带下赤白相杂，或黄绿如脓，或如米泔水 样，或五色杂下，臭腐难闻为主要表现的带 下病。

V002-N00643.label: 五色带
V002-N00643.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜带下症状
V002-N00643.definition: 指从妇女阴道内流出的多种颜色相杂而恶臭的黏液分泌物的表现。

V002-N00644.label: 白崩
V002-N00644.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜带下病

V002-N00644.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00644.label: 白崩
V002-N00644.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00644.definition: Characterized by persistent, profuse and whitish vaginal discharges that resemble rice-washed water or transparent mucus. Often results from yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney, unsafe sex, or contraction of cold dampness or damp heat. This condition is commonly seen in the elderly women or women with a weakened immune system.

V002-N00645.label: 白带
V002-N00645.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜带下病

V002-N00645.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00645.label: 白带病
V002-N00645.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜带下病（总）
V002-N00645.definition: 以带下以色白为主的带下病。

V002-N00645.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00645.label: 白带
V002-N00645.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N00645.definition: 1) Physiological vaginal discharge. 2) Persistent, profuse vaginal discharge with abnormal changes in colour, quality and odour.

V002-N00645.label: 白带
V002-N00645.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00645.definition: 带下以色白为主的带下病。

V002-N00645.label: 白带
V002-N00645.path: 临床术语｜诊察对象｜望诊对象｜排出物
V002-N00645.definition: 妇女从阴道中流出的少量白色黏性分泌物，无臭气，为正常表现；如黏液增多，连绵不断，或带有腥臭味，为病理表现。

V002-N00645.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00645.label: 白带
V002-N00645.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00645.definition: (1) whitish discharge from the vagina; (2) a disease marked by white discharge from the vagina

V002-N00646.label: 赤带
V002-N00646.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜带下病

V002-N00646.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00646.label: 赤带
V002-N00646.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜带下病
V002-N00646.definition: 带下以似血非血的红色黏液为主的带下病。

V002-N00647.label: 黄带
V002-N00647.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜带下病

V002-N00647.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00647.label: 黄带病
V002-N00647.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜带下病（总）
V002-N00647.definition: 以带下以色黄为主的带下病。

V002-N00647.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00647.label: 黄带
V002-N00647.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N00647.definition: Pale yellow, sticky vaginal discharge. In some cases, the discharge may have a colour that resembles thick tea and a strong odour. Often occurs when dampness transforms into heat and affects the Ren and Dai meridians.

V002-N00647.vocabName: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）
V002-N00647.label: 黄带
V002-N00647.path: 中医药学名词-内科学等（2010）｜中医妇科学｜带下病
V002-N00647.definition: 带下以色黄为主的带下病。

V002-N00647.label: 黄带病
V002-N00647.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00647.definition: 带下以色黄为主的带下病。

V002-N00647.label: 带下色黄
V002-N00647.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜带下症状
V002-N00647.definition: 妇女阴道中排出的黄色黏液，黏稠而淋漓不断，或有腥臭味，甚至如脓样。

V002-N00647.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00647.label: 黄带
V002-N00647.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00647.definition: yellowish viscous discharge from the vagina, usually indicating the presence of pathogenic damp-heat

V002-N00648.label: 月经类病
V002-N00648.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病

V002-N00648.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00648.label: 月经不调
V002-N00648.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00648.definition: 月经的周期、经期、经量的异常，即月经先期、月经后期、月经先后无定期、经期延长、月经过多、月经过少等的统称。

V002-N00648.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00648.label: 月经病
V002-N00648.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00648.definition: 月经的周期、经期喝经量、经质发生异常，伴随月经周期或于经断前后出现明显不适症状的疾病的统称。

V002-N00648.label: 月经周期病
V002-N00648.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类

V002-N00648.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00648.label: 月经类病
V002-N00648.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00648.definition: A group of disorders characterized by abnormal changes in menstrual cycle, duration, volume, colour, and quality of menses, coupled with menstrual complaints. They often result from disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians.

V002-N00648.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00648.label: 月经不调
V002-N00648.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00648.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00648.label: 月经病
V002-N00648.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00648.label: 月经病
V002-N00648.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00648.definition: 月经的周期、经期和经量、经质、经色发生异 常的疾病的统称。

V002-N00648.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00648.label: 月经病
V002-N00648.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病
V002-N00648.definition: 月经的周期、经期和经量、经质、经色发生异常，月经非生理性停闭，以及伴随月经周期、绝经前后所出现的明显不适症状为特征的疾病的统称。

V002-N00648.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00648.label: 月经失调
V002-N00648.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病
V002-N00648.definition: 通常将月经周期、经期、经间、经量病变称为月经不调，而将闭经、崩漏视为月经的严重失调。月经不调主要指月经先期、月经后期、月经先后无定期、月经过多、月经过少、经期延长、经间期出血等。

V002-N00648.label: 月经病
V002-N00648.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病
V002-N00648.definition: 凡月经的周期、经期和经量发生异常，以及伴随月经周期出现明显不适症状的疾病，称为“月经病”，是妇科临床的多发病。

V002-N00648.label: 月经周期病
V002-N00648.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病

V002-N00648.label: 月经不调
V002-N00648.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状

V002-N00648.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00648.label: 月经不调
V002-N00648.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00648.definition: a general term for irregular menstruation and other menstrual complaints, such as abnormal duration, amount, color and quality of menstrual discharge

V002-N00648.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00648.label: 月经病
V002-N00648.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00648.definition: a collective term for diseases characterized by abnormal interval, duration, quantity, color, quality of menses, non-physiological stoppage, as well as manifest symptoms with the periods or around menopause, the same as emmeniopathy

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V002-N00649.label: 崩中
V002-N00649.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT15657-2021-中医病证分类与代码
V002-N00649.label: 漏下
V002-N00649.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N00649.label: 崩中
V002-N00649.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏
V002-N00649.definition: 因血热而迫血妄行，或瘀血阻滞，血不循经，或气虚冲任不固所致。临床以月经周期紊乱，子宫出血量多而势急如崩等为特征的崩漏病。

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N00649.label: 漏下
V002-N00649.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏
V002-N00649.definition: 因肾虚、血瘀，冲任失约，肝不藏血所致。临床以月经周期紊乱，子宫出血量少而势缓，淋漓不尽等为特征的崩漏病。

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00649.label: 崩中
V002-N00649.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00649.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道下血不止，量大而势急如崩为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00649.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道突然大量下血不止，或小量下血淋漓不断为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00649.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00649.label: 漏下
V002-N00649.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00649.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道下血，量少而淋漓不断为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00649.vocabName: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜月经病类

V002-N00649.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00649.label: 崩中
V002-N00649.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00649.definition: Characterized by irregular menstrual cycle and sudden, profuse uterine bleeding. Often occurs when heat forces the blood to move recklessly. Alternatively, it may occur as a result of stagnant blood or qi failing to secure the Chong and Ren meridians.

V002-N00649.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00649.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of excessive uterine bleeding or small but continuous uterine bleeding. It includes metrorrhagia and metrostaxis, often resulting from insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, blood heat, damp heat, qi deficiency, blood stasis, or trauma, etc.

V002-N00649.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00649.label: 漏下
V002-N00649.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00649.definition: Characterized by irregular menstrual cycle and small but continuous uterine bleeding. Often occurs as a result of kidney deficiency, blood stasis and insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians.

V002-N00649.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00649.label: 崩中
V002-N00649.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00649.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00649.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00649.label: 漏下
V002-N00649.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00649.vocabName: 中医药学名词（2004）
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00649.definition: 以妇女不在行经期间，阴道突然大量下血， 或淋漓下血不断为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00649.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病
V002-N00649.definition: 妇女非正常行经而阴道下血如崩或淋漓不尽的症状。势急而出血量多者为崩；势缓而出血量少、淋漓不断者为漏。多由血热、湿热、气虚、血瘀、外伤等所致。妇女月经病变、崩漏病，以及石瘕、胎漏、异位妊娠、新产血崩、产后恶露不绝、疫斑热、紫癜病、血溢病等病中皆可出现崩漏。

V002-N00649.vocabName: 临床术语
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00649.definition: 多由脾虚、肾虚、血热、血瘀造成的月经周期、经期、经量发生严重失常的病证，是指经血非时暴下不止或淋漓不尽，前者谓之崩中，后者谓之漏下。

V002-N00649.vocabName: 临床术语
V002-N00649.label: 崩漏
V002-N00649.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜月经不调
V002-N00649.definition: 崩漏是月经的周期，经期，经量发生严重失常的病症，是指经血非时暴下不止或淋漓不尽，前者谓之崩中，后者谓之漏下。

V002-N00649.definition: sudden onset of profuse uterine bleeding or incessant dripping of blood, occurring not in the regular menstruation period, the same as metrorrhagia

V002-N00650.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N00650.label: 崩漏
V002-N00650.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V002-N00650.definition: 因肾虚、血热、湿热、气虚、血瘀、外伤等，致使冲任不固所致。临床以妇女非正常行经期间阴道下血如崩或淋漓不尽等为特征的月经病。注：包括崩中和漏下等。

V002-N00650.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00650.label: 崩中
V002-N00650.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00650.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道下血不止，量大而势急如崩为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00650.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00650.label: 崩漏
V002-N00650.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00650.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道突然大量下血不止，或小量下血淋漓不断为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00650.label: 崩漏
V002-N00650.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜月经病类

V002-N00650.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00650.label: 崩中
V002-N00650.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00650.definition: Characterized by irregular menstrual cycle and sudden, profuse uterine bleeding. Often occurs when heat forces the blood to move recklessly. Alternatively, it may occur as a result of stagnant blood or qi failing to secure the Chong and Ren meridians.

V002-N00650.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00650.label: 崩漏
V002-N00650.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00650.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of excessive uterine bleeding or small but continuous uterine bleeding. It includes metrorrhagia and metrostaxis, often resulting from insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, blood heat, damp heat, qi deficiency, blood stasis, or trauma, etc.

V002-N00650.label: 崩中

V002-N00650.label: 崩漏
V002-N00650.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00650.definition: 以妇女不在行经期间，阴道突然大量下血， 或淋漓下血不断为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00650.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00650.label: 崩漏
V002-N00650.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医妇产科疾病｜中医妇科病｜月经病
V002-N00650.definition: 妇女非正常行经而阴道下血如崩或淋漓不尽的症状。势急而出血量多者为崩；势缓而出血量少、淋漓不断者为漏。多由血热、湿热、气虚、血瘀、外伤等所致。妇女月经病变、崩漏病，以及石瘕、胎漏、异位妊娠、新产血崩、产后恶露不绝、疫斑热、紫癜病、血溢病等病中皆可出现崩漏。

V002-N00652.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V002-N00652.definition: 以月经周期时或提前时或延后7天以上，交替不定，且连续3个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V002-N00652.label: 月经先后无定期
V002-N00652.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜月经周期病

V002-N00652.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00652.label: 月经先后无定期
V002-N00652.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00652.definition: A menstrual cycle that begins more than one week early or late for three consecutive months. Often results from liver qi stagnation, kidney deficiency or disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians.

V002-N00652.label: 月经先后无定期

V002-N00652.label: 月经先后无定期
V002-N00652.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00652.definition: 以月经周期提前错后不定为主要表现的月 经病。

V002-N00652.label: 月经先后无定期
V002-N00652.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病｜月经周期病
V002-N00652.definition: 月经周期或前或后1～2周者，连续3个周期以上，称为“月经先后无定期”。又称“经水先后无定期 ”、“月经愆期”、“经乱”。

V002-N00652.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00652.label: 月经先后无定期
V002-N00652.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00652.definition: periods that come with an irregular cycle, more than one week early or later

V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V002-N00653.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）｜月经不调
V002-N00653.definition: 以月经提前7天以上至半月以内者，并且连续发生2个周期以上，经期基本正常为特征的月经病。

V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜女性生殖系统（包括分娩）病类｜月经周期病

V002-N00653.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00653.definition: A menstrual cycle that begins at least one week early for three consecutive months, with a normal menstrual duration. Often results from insecurity of Chong and Ren meridians (due to qi deficiency) or heat disturbing the Chong and Ren meridians.

V002-N00653.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00653.label: 经早
V002-N00653.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00653.definition: 以月经周期比正常提前为主要表现的月经 病。

V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病｜月经周期病
V002-N00653.definition: 月经周期提前1～2周者，连续两个周期以上，称为“月经先期”。亦称“经期超前”或“经早”。

V002-N00653.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00653.label: 月经先期
V002-N00653.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00653.definition: periods that come one week or more ahead of due time, for more than two successive periods

V002-N00654.label: 月经前后诸病
V002-N00654.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V002-N00654.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00654.label: 月经前后诸症
V002-N00654.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00654.definition: A group of menstrual disorders that occurs days before or during menstruation.

V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: GBT20348-2006 中医基础理论术语｜病机学｜脏腑病机｜脏腑相兼病机
V002-N00655.definition: 妇女经期或经后，邪热乘虚侵入血室，血热互结的病理变化。

V002-N00655.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜妇科杂病
V002-N00655.definition: 以妇女在经期或月经前后，因感受外邪，邪热乘虚侵入血室，热与血搏，出现寒热如疟，或胸胁、少腹满痛，或谵语，或伴经量异常为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜中医基础理论｜病机
V002-N00655.definition: 外感病适逢妇人月经来潮，或月经适断，邪热与血互相搏结的病理变化。

V002-N00655.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜证候｜气血津液证候｜血病｜血热
V002-N00655.definition: 邪热侵及血室，以少腹灼热疼痛、拒按，月经量多或经闭，发热口渴，烦躁如狂，舌红绛，苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病机｜脏腑病机｜奇恒之腑病机
V002-N00655.definition: 指外感病适逢妇人月经来潮，或月经适断，邪热与血互相搏结的病理变化。

V002-N00655.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00655.label: 热入血室
V002-N00655.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜基础理论｜病机类
V002-N00655.definition: the pathogenic heat exploiting deficiency during menstruation or after childbirth to enter the blood chamber and contend with the blood

V002-N00656.label: 经行乳房胀痛
V002-N00656.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00656.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00656.definition: 以行径前后或经期，周期性出现乳房胀满或疼痛，或伴有乳房痒痛，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00656.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00656.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00656.definition: Characterized by breast distension or nipple itch/pain before or during menstruation. Often occurs as a result of liver qi stagnation or phlegm dampness obstructing the meridians.

V002-N00656.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00656.label: 经行乳房胀痛
V002-N00656.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00656.label: 经行乳房胀痛
V002-N00656.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00656.definition: 以行经前，乳房胀满疼痛，按之有块为主要 表现的月经病。

V002-N00656.label: 经行乳房胀痛
V002-N00656.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00656.definition: 每值经前或经期，乳房作胀，甚至胀满疼痛，或乳头痒痛者甚至不能触衣者，称为“经行乳房胀痛”。

V002-N00656.label: 经前乳胀
V002-N00656.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜经前症状
V002-N00656.definition: 属于妇产科视诊所见的一种异常症状。是指每届经前3-7天或正值经期出现乳房胀满疼痛，或乳头痒痛，而经后消失的症状。

V002-N00656.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00656.label: 经行乳房胀痛
V002-N00656.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00656.definition: distention or sensation of fullness and pain in the breasts before, during, or after menstruation

V002-N00657.label: 经行发热
V002-N00657.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00657.definition: 以经前或经期出现周期性发热，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00657.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00657.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00657.definition: Characterized by fever before or during menstruation. Often results from disorder of qi and blood and disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence.

V002-N00657.label: 经行发热
V002-N00657.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00657.definition: 以经前或经期出现周期性发热为主要表现 的月经病。

V002-N00657.label: 经行发热
V002-N00657.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00657.definition: 每值经期或经行前后，出现以发热为主的病证，称“经行发热”。又称“经来发热”。

V002-N00657.label: 经行发热

V002-N00658.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00658.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00658.label: 经行口糜
V002-N00658.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00658.definition: 以径前、经期出现周期性口舌糜烂、生疮，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00658.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00658.definition: Characterized by congestion, oedema and ulceration on the oral mucosa before or during menstruation but heals spontaneously after menstruation. Often occurs as a result of stomach heat or fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V002-N00658.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00658.label: 经行口糜
V002-N00658.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00658.label: 经行口糜
V002-N00658.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00658.definition: 每值经前或经期，口舌生疮、糜烂者，如期反复发作，经后渐愈，称“经行口糜”。

V002-N00658.label: 经行口糜

V002-N00659.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00659.definition: 以经期出现周期性的吐血、鼻衄并伴有月经量少或不行，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00659.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM

V002-N00659.definition: Characterized by vomiting of blood or nosebleed before or during menstruation. Individuals may experience decreased or little menstrual volume. Often occurs when heat forces the blood to ascend along the pathway of Chong meridian.

V002-N00659.definition: 以经期出现周期性的吐血、鼻衄并伴有月经 量少或不行为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00659.definition: 每逢经行前后或正值经期，出现有规律的吐血或衄血者，并伴随月经周期作止。

V002-N00659.label: 经行吐衄
V002-N00659.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00659.definition: 每值经前或经期，出现有规律的吐血或衄血者，称为“经行吐衄”。又称“倒经”、“逆经”。

V002-N00659.label: 经行吐衄

V002-N00659.definition: discharge of blood from some part other than the vagina during the menstrual period, such as bleeding from the nose or vomiting of blood

V002-N00660.label: 经行失眠
V002-N00660.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00660.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00660.label: 经行失眠
V002-N00660.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00660.definition: Characterized by insomnia or sleepless throughout the night before or during menstruation but stops spontaneously after menstruation. Contributing factors may include excessive worries, over-exertion, blood deficiency, liver qi stagnation transforming into fire, or fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency.

V002-N00661.label: 经行头痛
V002-N00661.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00661.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00661.label: 经行头痛
V002-N00661.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00661.definition: 以行径前后、经期出现周期性头痛，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00661.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00661.label: 经行头痛
V002-N00661.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00661.definition: Characterized by headache before or during menstruation. Often results from deficiency of qi and blood, stagnation of qi and blood, or hyperactivity of liver fire due to yin deficiency.

V002-N00661.label: 经行头痛
V002-N00661.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00661.definition: 以经前或经期出现周期性头痛为主要表现 的月经病。

V002-N00661.label: 经行头痛
V002-N00661.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00661.definition: 每值经期或行经前后，出现以头痛为主的病证，经后辄止者，称为“经行头痛”。

V002-N00661.label: 经行头痛

V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00662.definition: 以经前、经期出现周期性烦躁易怒，情志抑郁，悲伤欲哭，坐卧不宁，经后又复如常人为特征的月经病。

V002-N00662.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00662.definition: Characterized by restlessness, irritability, sadness or weeping before or during menstruation. Alternatively, depression and sleepless throughout the night may be present. Often occurs as a result of liver qi stagnation or ascending of phlegm fire.

V002-N00662.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00662.definition: 以经期、经前出现烦躁易怒，清志抑郁，悲伤 欲哭，坐卧不宁，经后又复如常人为主要表 现的月经病。

V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00662.definition: 每值经前或经期出现烦躁易怒，或情志抑郁，悲伤欲哭，坐卧不宁，经后又复如常人者，称为“经行情志异常”。

V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜经期症状

V002-N00662.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N00662.label: 经行情志异常
V002-N00662.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜妇产科
V002-N00662.definition: depression, gloominess, irritability and other changes of mood occurring around each menstrual period and returning to normal after the period

V002-N00663.label: 经行泄泻
V002-N00663.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00663.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V002-N00663.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00663.definition: 以行径前后、经期，周期性出现大便泄泻，日行数次，经净自止为特征的月经病。

V002-N00663.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00663.label: 经行泄泻
V002-N00663.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00663.definition: Characterized by diarrhoea before or during menstruation but stops spontaneously after menstruation. Often occurs as a result of yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V002-N00663.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00663.label: 经行泄泻
V002-N00663.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00663.label: 经行泄泻
V002-N00663.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00663.definition: 以行经前，周期性出现大便泄泻，月行数次， 经净自止为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00663.label: 经行泄泻
V002-N00663.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00663.definition: 每值经前或经期，大便泄泻，经净自止者，称为“经行泄泻”。亦称“经来泄泻”。

V002-N00663.label: 经行泄泻
V002-N00663.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜经带胎产症状｜月经症状｜经期症状

V002-N00664.label: 经行浮肿
V002-N00664.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜月经前后诸病

V002-N00664.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N00664.label: 经行浮肿
V002-N00664.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第6部分 妇科学｜月经病（总）
V002-N00664.definition: 以行径前后、经期出血周期性头面四肢浮肿，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00664.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00664.label: 经行浮肿
V002-N00664.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00664.definition: Characterized by facial puffiness and generalized oedema before or during menstruation. Often occurs as a result of yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney or qi stagnation and dampness retention.

V002-N00664.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N00664.label: 经行浮肿
V002-N00664.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜妇科病

V002-N00664.label: 经行浮肿
V002-N00664.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00664.definition: 以经期、行经前后出现头面四肢浮肿为主要 表现的月经病。

V002-N00664.label: 经行浮肿
V002-N00664.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00664.definition: 每值经前或经期，头面四肢浮肿者，称为“经行浮肿”。或称“经来遍身浮肿”。

V002-N00665.label: 经行眩晕

V002-N00665.definition: 以行经前后、经期出现周期性头晕目眩，视物昏花经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V002-N00665.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N00665.label: 经行眩晕
V002-N00665.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N00665.definition: Characterized by dizziness and blurred vision before or during menstruation. Often results from hyperactivity of liver yang due to yin blood deficiency or phlegm dampness obstructing the clean yang.

V002-N00665.label: 经行眩晕
V002-N00665.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜妇科疾病
V002-N00665.definition: 以经期、经行前后，周期性出现头晕目眩，视 物昏花为主要表现的月经病。

V002-N00665.label: 经行眩晕
V002-N00665.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医妇产科疾病｜月经病
V002-N00665.definition: 每值经期或经行前后，出现头晕目眩，视物昏花为主的病证，称为“经行眩晕”。

V002-N00665.label: 经行眩晕
