V002-N01333.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N01333.label: 关格
V002-N01333.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V002-N01333.definition: 因水肿、癃闭、淋病等晚期，脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利，湿浊毒邪上攻犯胃，或化热动风，甚或上蒙清空所致。临床以小便不通与呕吐不止并见，伴见皮肤瘙痒，口中臭秽，或有尿味，甚或手足搐搦，昏睡，神识不清等为特征的肾系病重症。

V002-N01333.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01333.label: 关格
V002-N01333.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N01333.definition: 关于格的合称。以小便不通（关）于呕吐不止（格）并见为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01333.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01333.label: 肠结
V002-N01333.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01333.definition: 以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣，矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01333.label: 关格
V002-N01333.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N01333.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01333.label: 关格
V002-N01333.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01333.definition: A critical condition characterized by urinary retention and persistent vomiting, coupled with skin itching, and a strong-odoured breath. In severe cases, convulsions of the hands and feet, drowsiness and mental cloudiness may be present. Often occurs in late-stage oedema, urinary retention or strangury. Contributing factors may include impaired qi transformation due to yin/yang failure of the spleen and kidney and toxic, turbid dampness attacking the stomach. Alternatively, it may also occur when dampness transforms into heat and stirs wind, or in severe cases, to disturb the heart mind.

V002-N01333.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01333.label: 肠结
V002-N01333.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01333.definition: Characterized by paroxysmal abdominal colic, abdominal bloating, absence of bowel sounds, flatus, and constipation. Often occurs when abdominal surgery, tumour compression or carcinoma toxins obstruct the flow of intestinal qi.

V002-N01333.label: 关格
V002-N01333.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01333.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。 小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V002-N01333.definition: 多因腹部手术损伤，或实邪内积，使肠体活动异常而搏结不通，气机阻塞所致。以腹痛、呕吐，腹胀，便秘为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N01290.definition: 以清醒时小便自出不觉，或小便频数，难以自制为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01291.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01291.definition: Characterized by large amounts of dilute urine and excessive thirst. Often occurs when the kidney fails to perform the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V002-N01291.label: 尿崩
V002-N01291.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01291.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表 现的肾系疾病。

V002-N01291.definition: 因肾虚下元不固，或脑神等病变及肾，肾之气化失司，水津直趋膀胱而下泄。以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的肾系疾病。

V002-N01292.label: 尿道瘘
V002-N01292.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01292.label: 尿道瘘

V002-N01292.definition: 因外力或手术等损伤，使尿道造成瘘管与外界相通。以有尿液自瘘管外口溢出为主要表现的瘘病类疾病。

V002-N01293.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01293.label: 强中
V002-N01293.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01293.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged erection of the penis. Contributing factors may include liver fire, stasis, damp heat, overuse of aphrodisiac drugs or sexual indulgence. These factors may cause internal toxic fire and trigger ministerial fire to consume kidney yang and result in hyperactivity of deficiency yang.

V002-N01293.label: 阳强
V002-N01293.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病

V002-N01293.definition: 指阴茎久举不痿、精液自泄为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01294.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01294.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01294.label: 淋证
V002-N01294.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N01294.definition: 以小便频急，淋漓不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。注：包括热淋、石淋、气淋、血淋、膏淋、劳淋等。

V002-N01294.label: 淋证
V002-N01294.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N01294.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01294.label: 淋证
V002-N01294.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01294.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent, hesitant and painful urination. The pain during urination may radiate to the low back and abdomen. Contributing factors may include damp heat affecting the lower jiao, deficiency of the spleen and kidney, liver qi stagnation, tuberculosis, stones or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V002-N01294.label: 淋证
V002-N01294.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01294.label: 淋证
V002-N01294.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01294.definition: 以小便频急，淋沥不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘 急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N01294.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表

V002-N01294.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V002-N01294.definition: 以小便频急、淋沥不尽、尿道涩痛、小腹拘急、痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V002-N01294.label: 淋证
V002-N01294.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01294.definition: 是因肾、膀胱气化失司、水道不利而致的以小便频急、淋沥不尽、尿道涩痛、小腹拘急、痛引腰腹为主要临床表现的一类病证。

V002-N01295.label: 劳淋
V002-N01295.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V002-N01295.definition: 以经常腰部酸痛，全身倦怠，小便淋漓涩痛，遇劳即发为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01295.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01295.label: 劳淋
V002-N01295.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01295.definition: Characterized by recurrent, fatigue-induced frequent, urgent, painful and dripping urination, lower back painlower back pain, and lassitude. Associated symptoms may include tidal, low-grade fever and weight loss. Contributing factors may include retention of toxins due to chronic strangury, excessive worries or mental exertion damaging the heart and spleen, sexual indulgence damaging the kidney or tuberculosis affecting the opening and closing of the urinary bladder.

V002-N01295.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01295.label: 劳淋
V002-N01295.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01295.label: 劳淋
V002-N01295.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01295.definition: 以经常腰部酸痛，小便淋沥不已，遇劳即发 为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01295.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01295.label: 劳淋
V002-N01295.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证

V002-N01295.definition: 因热淋等迁延日久或反复发作，邪毒蕴结，气阴亏损，常因劳倦或外感而发。以经常腰痛，小便频急，淋漓隐痛为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V002-N01296.definition: 以小腹胀满，小便艰涩疼痛，尿后余沥不尽为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01296.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01296.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal distension and fullness, frequent, hesitant, painful or dripping urination. Contributing factors may include liver qi stagnation or age-related qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney. These factors may impair the qi transformation or opening and closing of the urinary bladder.

V002-N01296.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01296.definition: 以小腹胀满较明显，小便艰涩疼痛，尿后余 沥不尽为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01296.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V002-N01296.definition: 以小腹胀满较明显、小便艰涩疼痛、尿后余沥不尽为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01296.label: 气淋
V002-N01296.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N01296.definition: 因气机郁滞，膀胱气化不利所致，以郁怒之后，小便涩滞，淋沥不宣，少腹胀满疼痛，苔薄白，脉弦为主要病症的疾病。

V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V002-N01297.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V002-N01297.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类｜淋证

V002-N01297.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01297.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent and painful urination with scanty, red urine and a burning sensation. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, lower back painlower back pain, lower abdominal cramps, distension and pain, a yellow, greasy tongue coating and a slippery, rapid pulse. Often occurs when damp heat affects the kidney and urinary bladder.

V002-N01297.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01297.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄 为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01297.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V002-N01297.definition: 因染受湿热之邪，使膀胱气化不利，以引起尿频、尿痛、尿急、尿血为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V002-N01297.label: 热淋
V002-N01297.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N01297.definition: 因染受湿热之邪，使膀胱气化不利。以新起尿频，尿痛，尿急，尿血为主要表现的淋病类疾病。

V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V002-N01298.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V002-N01298.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类｜淋证

V002-N01298.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01298.definition: Characterized by lower back painlower back pain, haematuria or discharge of stones, coupled with positive imaging findings of urinary stones. Often occurs when damp heat scorches the urine into stones.

V002-N01298.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01298.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中 断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表 现的淋证。

V002-N01298.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V002-N01298.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴结下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结为砂石，停阻于肾系。以腰痛、尿血，或尿出砂石。

V002-N01298.label: 石淋
V002-N01298.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N01298.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴结下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结尾砂石，停阻于肾系。以腰痛，尿血，或尿出砂石，或经检查发现结石为特征的结石类疾病。

V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V002-N01299.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V002-N01299.definition: 以小便浑浊如米泔水或滑腻如膏脂为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01299.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01299.definition: Characterized by recurrent painful discharge of turbid, milky urine like rice water, cream or sauce, and back pain/soreness. Associated symptoms may include hesitant urination, oedema, fatigue, or anaemia. Symptoms can be induced or exacerbated by high-fat diet, fatigue or exposure to cold. Contributing factors may include damp heat due to deficiency of the spleen and kidney, filariasis, tuberculosis or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the lower jiao.

V002-N01299.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01299.definition: 以小便浑浊如米泔水或滑腻如膏脂为主要 表现的淋证。

V002-N01299.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V002-N01299.definition: 以小便浑浊如米泔水或滑腻如膏脂为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01299.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01299.label: 乳糜尿
V002-N01299.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜排尿障碍
V002-N01299.definition: 尿中混有杂物，外观浑浊如米泔、牛乳状。

V002-N01299.label: 膏淋
V002-N01299.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N01299.definition: 湿热下注，阻滞络脉，脂汁外溢，以小便浑浊，乳白或如米泔水，上有浮油，置之沉淀，或伴有絮状凝状物，或混有血液、血块，尿道热涩疼痛，尿时阻塞不畅，口干，苔黄腻，舌质红，脉濡数为病症的疾病。

V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V002-N01300.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V002-N01300.definition: 以溺血而痛为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01300.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01300.definition: Characterized by painful urination with blood in urine. Often occurs when damp heat or cold damp affects the bladder and enters the bloodstream to cause the blood to move recklessly. It may also occur when qi fails to control blood within the vessels or when qi deficiency results in blood stagnation.

V002-N01300.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01300.definition: 以溺血而痛为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01300.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病｜淋证
V002-N01300.definition: 以溺血而痛为主要表现的淋证。

V002-N01300.label: 血淋
V002-N01300.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证｜淋证
V002-N01300.definition: 湿热下注膀胱，热甚灼络，迫血忘行，以小便热涩刺痛，尿色深红，或夹有血块，疼痛满急加剧，或见心烦，舌尖红，苔黄，脉滑数为主要变现的淋病类疾病。

V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01301.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N01301.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N01301.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01301.definition: Characterized by scanty urine, dripping urination and lower abdominal distension/pain. In severe cases, individuals may experience an inability to empty the bladder. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, stagnant blood, stones or tumours obstructing the urethra, kidney yang failing to perform qi transformation, kidney yin deficiency or surgery.

V002-N01301.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01301.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N01301.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜肾病
V002-N01301.definition: 因败精阻塞、阴部手术等，使膀胱气化失司，水道不利，以小便量少、点滴而出、甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N01301.label: 癃闭
V002-N01301.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01301.definition: 是由于肾和膀胱气化失司而导致尿量减少，排尿困难，甚则小便闭塞不通主症的一种病证。其中又以小便不利，点滴而短少，病势较缓者称为“癃”；以小便闭塞，点滴全无，病势较急者称为“闭”。癃和闭虽有区别，但都是指排尿困难，只有程度上的不同，因此多合称为癃闭。

V002-N01301.label: 小便不通
V002-N01301.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜小便症状
V002-N01301.definition: 小便排出困难，严重者点滴难出的表现。

V002-N01301.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01301.label: 小便难
V002-N01301.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类

V002-N01302.label: 精癃
V002-N01302.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01302.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01302.label: 精癃
V002-N01302.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第2部分 外科学｜泌尿生殖系统疾病
V002-N01302.definition: 年老肾虚，精室肥大，以尿频，排尿困难，滴沥不尽，甚或尿闭为主要表现的男性生殖器疾病。注：包括前列腺肥大、前列腺增生症。

V002-N01302.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01302.label: 精癃
V002-N01302.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01302.definition: Characterized by frequent urination, trouble starting to urinate, weak stream, or inability to urinate. If often occurs when age-related kidney qi deficiency and qi weakness of the spleen and stomach cause phlegm and stasis to impair the qi transformation of Sanjiao.

V002-N01302.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01302.label: 精癃
V002-N01302.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜外科病

V002-N01302.label: 精癃
V002-N01302.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01302.definition: 年老肾虚，精室肥大，以排尿困难，滴沥不 尽，甚或尿闭为主要表现的前列腺疾病。

V002-N01302.label: 精癃
V002-N01302.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜泌尿、男性前阴病
V002-N01302.definition: 是指精室肥大的泌尿生殖系疾病。其特点是排尿困难和尿潴留。相当于西医的前列腺肥大，又称前列腺增生症。

V002-N01303.label: 缩阴病
V002-N01303.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01303.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01303.label: 缩阴病
V002-N01303.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01303.definition: Characterized by intense lower abdominal pain, a subjective feeling of genital (penis, testis, scrotum, vulva or breasts) shrinking. Often occurs when cold obstructs the liver meridian or when yang fails to warm the external genitalia.

V002-N01303.label: 缩阴病
V002-N01303.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01303.definition: 因寒邪阻滞肝经，或阳虚筋脉失却温煦、阴虚筋脉失养，使宗筋拘急所致。以小腹剧痛，自觉阴茎、睾丸、阴囊突然内缩（妇女为阴户、乳房内缩）为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N01303.label: 阴缩
V002-N01303.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二阴症状｜前阴症状

V002-N01304.label: 肾厥
V002-N01304.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01304.label: 肾厥
V002-N01304.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01304.definition: A severe condition characterized by mental cloudiness in patients with chronic kidney diseases. Often results from kidney qi exhaustion and turbid dampness misting the mind.

V002-N01304.label: 肾厥
V002-N01304.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01304.definition: 因肾脏的严重病变，致肾气衰竭，气化失司，湿浊尿毒内蕴，上泛而蒙闭脑神。在肾病症状基础上，出现以神识昏蒙为主要表现的肾病及脑的厥病类疾病。

V002-N01305.label: 肾垂
V002-N01305.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01305.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01305.label: 肾垂
V002-N01305.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01305.definition: Characterized by a bearing-down sensation and lower back pain. Alternatively, recurrent bloody urine may be present. Often occurs when constitutional weakness or overexertion causes qi to sink.

V002-N01305.label: 肾垂
V002-N01305.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01305.definition: 因素体虚弱，或劳倦内伤，气虚下陷，无力系肾，以致在直立时肾脏下降至下腹部或盆腔内。以腰部下坠感及疼痛，或反复尿血为主要表现的劳病类疾病。

V002-N01306.label: 肾水病
V002-N01306.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01306.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01306.label: 肾水病
V002-N01306.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01306.definition: Characterized by persistent oedema, belly bulging, scanty urine, lower back painlower back pain, and a dark facial complexion, coupled with persistent proteinuria, haematuria, hypoproteinaemia and hyperlipidaemia. During an acute attack, kidney water is known as kidney wind. Often occurs when kidney yang fails to transform qi and circulate water due to recurrent oedema, coupled with wind heat or drug-related toxins damage the kidney.

V002-N01306.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01306.label: 肾风
V002-N01306.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01307.label: 肾痈
V002-N01307.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01307.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01307.label: 肾痈
V002-N01307.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N01307.definition: 以痈生于京门穴处，高热，腰痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01307.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01307.label: 肾痈
V002-N01307.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01307.definition: A condition (secondary to abscess in Jingmen (GB 25) or other body parts) characterized by sudden chills, fever, and severe lower back pain. Weak, hesitant urine stream, painful urination and pain in the renal area and costovertebral angle to percussion may also be present. Often occurs when toxins from the abscess affects the kidney.

V002-N01307.label: 肾痈
V002-N01307.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01307.definition: 以高热，腰痛为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾 病。

V002-N01307.label: 肾痈
V002-N01307.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01307.definition: 因热毒壅滞于肾，使血败肉腐，形成痈脓。以高热，腰痛等为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N01308.label: 肾瘅
V002-N01308.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01308.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01308.label: 肾热病
V002-N01308.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病
V002-N01308.definition: 邪热伤肾，以发热恶寒，腰部胀痛，尿热，尿频，尿急，尿痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01308.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01308.label: 肾瘅
V002-N01308.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01308.definition: Characterized by fever, lower back painlower back pain and abnormal urination. Often occurs when damp heat or toxic warmth affects the kidney.

V002-N01308.label: 肾瘅
V002-N01308.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01308.definition: 因湿热温毒等邪侵及于肾所致。以发热，腰痛，排尿异常等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N01309.label: 肾衰病
V002-N01309.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01309.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01309.label: 肾衰
V002-N01309.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症

V002-N01309.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01309.label: 肾衰
V002-N01309.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01309.label: 肾衰
V002-N01309.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾膀胱病证
V002-N01309.definition: 可由暴病及肾，损伤肾气，或肾病日久，致肾气衰竭，气化失司，湿浊尿毒不得下泄，以急起少尿甚或无尿，继而多尿，或以精神萎靡，面色无华，口有尿味等为常见症状的脱病类疾病。

V002-N01310.label: 急性肾衰
V002-N01310.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜肾衰病

V002-N01311.label: 慢性肾衰
V002-N01311.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜肾衰病

V002-N01312.label: 遗尿病
V002-N01312.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V002-N01312.label: 遗尿
V002-N01312.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜肾系病类

V002-N01312.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01312.label: 遗尿
V002-N01312.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01312.definition: Characterized by repeated inability to control urination during sleep. Contributing factors may include congenital weakness, kidney qi deficiency or internal retention of damp heat and stagnant blood. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V002-N01312.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01312.label: 遗尿
V002-N01312.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N01312.label: 遗尿病
V002-N01312.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N01312.definition: 以小儿入睡后尿液不随意地流出为主要表 现的疾病。

V002-N01313.label: 脾系病
V002-N01313.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语

V002-N01313.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01313.label: 脾系病
V002-N01313.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01313.definition: Dysfunctions of the spleen system and meridians due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, emotional disturbance, over-exertion, water retention and stagnant blood.

V002-N01314.label: 伤食病
V002-N01314.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01314.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01314.label: 伤食
V002-N01314.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01314.definition: 饮食不节所致，以恶心厌食，嗳腐吐馊，脘腹胀痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01314.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01314.label: 伤食
V002-N01314.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01314.definition: Characterized by nausea, aversion to food, belching, a foul breath, gastric stuffiness and abdominal distension. Often occurs when binge eating damages the spleen and stomach or food retention coupled with external contraction of wind cold impairs the transportation and transformation of the stomach and intestines.

V002-N01314.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01314.label: 伤食
V002-N01314.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N01314.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01314.label: 伤食
V002-N01314.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N01314.definition: 因饮食不慎，进食过饱，或因脾胃不健，感受风寒，再加饮食失调，使食积胃肠，运化不及所致，以恶心厌食、嗳腐吐馊、脘腹胀痛等为主要表现的胃肠积滞性疾病。

V002-N01314.label: 饮食失宜
V002-N01314.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因
V002-N01314.definition: 指饮食不节、饮食不洁，饮食偏嗜等饮食失于常度的致病因素。

V002-N01314.label: 伤食
V002-N01314.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01314.definition: 因饮食不慎，进食过饱，或因脾胃不健，感受风寒，再加饮食失调，使食积胃肠，运化不及所致。以恶心厌食，嗳腐吐馊，脘腹胀痛等为主要表现的胃肠积滞性疾病。

V002-N01316.label: 脾约
V002-N01316.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜便秘病

V002-N01316.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V002-N01316.label: 便秘
V002-N01316.path: GBT 16751.1-2023 中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病｜临时诊断用术语
V002-N01316.definition: 临床以7天内排便少于2次，或长期无便意，或虽有便意，大便质硬难解等为特征的症状。多因胃肠积热，或阳虚寒凝，或气血阴津亏损，或腹内癥块阻结等所致。注：常见于肠道病变，以及肛门部病变、肌痿、风痱、颤病、肠外肿块压迫、温热病滥用或过服温燥收涩类方药、腹部手术后、高龄老人、全身衰惫状态等。

V002-N01316.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01316.label: 脾约
V002-N01316.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01316.definition: 胃强脾弱，脾虚津少，以小便数，大便硬，数日不行，口干腹胀，纳食尚可等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01316.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01316.label: 脾约
V002-N01316.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01316.definition: Characterized by dry stools, difficult, and infrequent bowel movements. Associated symptoms include abdominal distension, a dry mouth, and frequent urination. Contributing factors may include internal dry heat, age-related deficiency of yin fluids or yin cold retention due to spleen deficiency.

V002-N01316.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01316.label: 脾约
V002-N01316.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01316.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01316.label: 便秘
V002-N01316.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征｜排便异常
V002-N01316.definition: 大便秘结不通，排便时间延长，或时间虽不延长但排便困难的症状。胃肠积热，或阳虚寒凝，或气血阴津亏损，或腹内癥块阻结等，均可导致便秘。便秘除常见于肠道病变外，肛门部的病变、肌痿、风痱、肠外肿块压迫、温热病过程中、过服止泻药或温燥之品、腹部手术之后、全身衰惫状态等均可出现便秘。

V002-N01316.label: 脾约
V002-N01316.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01316.definition: 多因燥热内结，阴津亏少，或脾虚失运，阴寒凝滞等，使肠道传导迟缓所致。以经常大便干结，排便困难，排便间隔时间延长为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N01317.label: 卒腹痛
V002-N01317.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01317.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01317.label: 卒腹痛
V002-N01317.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜急症
V002-N01317.definition: 以突发腹部剧痛，难以忍受为主要表现的危急重病。

V002-N01317.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01317.label: 卒腹痛
V002-N01317.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01317.definition: Characterized by sudden intolerable and progressively aggravated abdominal pain or colic. Contributing factors may include stagnant qi and blood in the stomach and intestines due to six exogenous pathogenic factors, food poisoning, parasites, stagnant food, stones or dry faeces.

V002-N01318.label: 气腹痛
V002-N01318.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜卒腹痛

V002-N01318.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01318.label: 气腹痛
V002-N01318.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01318.definition: A paroxysmal abdominal pain with no physical changes. Often results from stomach/intestine qi stagnation due to improper diet, exposure to cold, emotional disturbance.

V002-N01318.label: 气腹痛
V002-N01318.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01318.definition: 因饮食不慎、感受寒邪、情志刺激等，使胃肠气机阻滞而发。以突起腹部阵发性剧痛为主要表现，而检查无形质改变的痛病类疾病。

V002-N01319.label: 厌食病
V002-N01319.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01319.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01319.label: 厌食
V002-N01319.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01319.definition: A symptom of aversion to food or the smell of food. Often results from damp heat in the spleen and stomach or in the liver and gallbladder.

V002-N01319.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01319.label: 厌食病
V002-N01319.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01319.definition: Characterized by ingestion of small amount of food, aversion to food, a poor appetite, weight loss, fatigue, and a body weight that is 75–85% below the standard weight. In severe cases, malnutrition and anaemia may also be present. Often results from qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach and stomach yin deficiency due to poor eating habits, dieting or acute/chronic diseases.

V002-N01319.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01319.label: 厌食
V002-N01319.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜儿科病

V002-N01319.label: 厌食病
V002-N01319.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜儿科疾病
V002-N01319.definition: 以长期厌恶饮食，消瘦疲乏为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N01319.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01319.label: 厌食
V002-N01319.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N01319.definition: 因娇生惯养，脾胃气虚，或因情志不畅，惧怕肥胖而节食等，日久而成。以长期厌恶饮食、消瘦疲乏为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N01319.label: 厌食
V002-N01319.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01319.definition: 因娇生惯养，脾胃气虚，或因情志不畅，惧怕肥胖而节食等，日久而成。以长期厌恶饮食，消瘦疲乏为主要表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N01319.label: 厌食
V002-N01319.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜饮食口味症状｜饮食症状
V002-N01319.definition: 对饮食有厌恶感，不愿进食的表现。

V002-N01319.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01319.label: 厌食
V002-N01319.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜儿科
V002-N01319.definition: a diseased state in children characterized by loss of appetite for food

V002-N01320.label: 反胃病
V002-N01320.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01320.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01320.label: 反胃[病]
V002-N01320.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01320.definition: 以脘腹痞胀，朝食暮吐，暮食朝吐，甚或食入不久即吐为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01320.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01320.label: 反胃病
V002-N01320.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01320.definition: Characterized by vomiting in the evening of food eaten in the morning and vomiting in the morning of food eaten in the evening. In severe cases, vomiting immediately after eating, gastric stuffiness, abdominal distension and indigestion may be present. Often results from an upward flow of rebellious stomach qi due to chronic gastrointestinal conditions, surgery, abdominal tumour or retention of food and phlegm in the stomach.

V002-N01320.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01320.label: 胃反
V002-N01320.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01320.label: 反胃
V002-N01320.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01320.definition: 同饮食不当、饥饱无常，或嗜食生冷，或忧愁思虑，损伤脾阳，脾胃虚寒，不能腐熟水谷。症见饮食入胃，宿谷不化，经过良久，由胃反出的病证。

V002-N01321.label: 呃逆病
V002-N01321.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01321.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01321.label: 呃逆
V002-N01321.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V002-N01321.definition: A brief, involuntary release of qi out of the throat. Often results from stomach qi failing to descend.

V002-N01321.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01321.label: 呃逆病
V002-N01321.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01321.definition: Characterized by involuntary brief “hic” sounds and, sometimes, gastric discomfort. Often results from an upward flow of rebellious stomach qi due to ingestion of cold, spicy food or intense emotions affecting the diaphragm.

V002-N01321.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01321.label: 呃逆
V002-N01321.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01321.label: 呃逆病
V002-N01321.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V002-N01321.definition: 以见呃有声，声音短促，持续不能自制为主 要表现的特发性疾病。

V002-N01321.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01321.label: 呃逆
V002-N01321.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜症状体征和证候｜症状和体征
V002-N01321.definition: 因进食生冷、辛辣，或情志郁怒等因素刺激下，膈间之气不利，引动胃气上冲喉间。以呃呃有声、声音短促、持续不能自制为主要表现的特发性疾病。

V002-N01321.label: 呃逆
V002-N01321.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01321.definition: 由饮食不节、情志不遂、正气亏虚等导致胃失和降，隔间气机不利，气逆动膈。症见喉间呃呃连声，声短而频，不能自止为主要表现的病证。呃逆古称“哕”，又称“哕逆”。

V002-N01321.label: 呃逆
V002-N01321.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜躯体症状｜胃脘症状
V002-N01321.definition: 气从胃中上逆，喉间频频作声，声音急而短促的表现。

V002-N01322.label: 噎膈病
V002-N01322.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01322.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01322.label: 噎膈
V002-N01322.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01322.definition: 以吞咽不利，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01322.label: 噎膈
V002-N01322.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N01322.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01322.label: 噎膈病
V002-N01322.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01322.definition: Characterized by difficulty in swallowing, vomiting immediately after eating food or inability to swallow solid food (a feeling of food stuck or held up before it either passes into the stomach or is regurgitated). Often occurs when phlegm qi stagnation (plum pit qi), stagnant fire, blood stasis or cancer toxin obstructs the oesophagus.

V002-N01322.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01322.label: 噎膈
V002-N01322.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01322.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01322.label: 吞食梗塞
V002-N01322.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V002-N01322.label: 噎膈
V002-N01322.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V002-N01322.definition: 以吞咽不顺，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾 病。

V002-N01322.label: 吞食梗塞
V002-N01322.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜诊断学｜诊法
V002-N01322.definition: 吞咽食物时梗噎不顺，甚或隔阻不通的表现。

V002-N01322.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01322.label: 噎膈
V002-N01322.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N01322.definition: 吞咽不顺、饮食梗塞难下的症状，常见于食管病变。

V002-N01322.label: 噎膈
V002-N01322.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01322.definition: 由七情内伤、酒食不节、久病年老致气痰瘀交阻，津气耗伤，胃失通降而发本病。症见吞咽食物哽咽不顺，饮食难下，或食而复出的疾患。

V002-N01322.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01322.label: 吞食梗塞
V002-N01322.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N01322.definition: difficulty or even inability to swallow

V002-N01323.label: 小肠瘅
V002-N01323.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01323.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01323.label: 小肠瘅
V002-N01323.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01323.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden abdominal pain, diarrhoea, fever and blood in stools. Often results from internal damp heat, stagnation of qi and blood and ingestion of contaminated food.

V002-N01323.label: 小肠瘅
V002-N01323.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01323.definition: 本有湿热内蕴，邪毒内结，气血瘀滞，肠络受损，再加饮食不洁而诱发。以骤发腹痛，腹泻便血，发热等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N01324.label: 泄泻病
V002-N01324.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01324.label: 泄泻
V002-N01324.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N01324.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01324.label: 泄泻病
V002-N01324.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01324.definition: Characterized by increased frequency of bowel movements, loose stools, stools containing undigested food or watery stools. Contributing factors may include external contraction of wind, cold, damp or heat, an improper diet, emotional disturbance or yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V002-N01324.label: 泄泻
V002-N01324.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V002-N01324.definition: 以腹泻、便溏为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01324.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01324.label: 泄泻
V002-N01324.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病
V002-N01324.definition: 大便次数增多，粪质稀薄为特征的症状。外感风寒湿热疫毒之邪，或饮食所伤，情志失调，或久病脾肾阳气亏虚等均可导致。临床有暴泻与久泻之分。脾胃、大小肠、肝胆胰的病变常有泄泻的症状。

V002-N01325.label: 久泻
V002-N01325.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N01325.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01325.label: 久泄
V002-N01325.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01325.definition: Diarrhoea that recurs or lasts longer than two months. It is often caused by deficiency of the spleen and kidney or disharmony between the liver and spleen.

V002-N01325.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01325.label: 久泄
V002-N01325.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01325.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01325.label: 久泻
V002-N01325.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01325.label: 久泻
V002-N01325.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病

V002-N01325.label: 久泻
V002-N01325.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜泄泻
V002-N01325.definition: 因腹泻日久，脾肾虚弱，或肝脾不调所致。以腹泻持续或反复超过2个月以上为主要表现的泄泻类疾病。

V002-N01325.label: 泄泻
V002-N01325.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜大便症状
V002-N01325.definition: 粪便稀薄，排便次数增加的表现，是多种类似症状的统称。

V002-N01326.label: 五更泻
V002-N01326.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N01326.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01326.label: 五更泻
V002-N01326.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01326.definition: A type of diarrhoea characterized by diarrhoea upon abdominal pain before dawn and the pain alleviates after bowel movements. Associated symptoms include cold intolerance, cold limbs, low back/knee soreness with a cold sensation and fatigue. Often results from congenital deficiency, kidney deficiency, or internal yin cold due to decline of the vital fire.

V002-N01326.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01326.label: 五更泄
V002-N01326.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01326.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01326.label: 肾泄
V002-N01326.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01326.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01326.label: 五更泻
V002-N01326.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜泄泻
V002-N01326.definition: 黎明前腹痛作泄，泄后则安，伴形寒肢冷，腰膝酸软者。

V002-N01326.label: 五更泻
V002-N01326.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜二便症状｜大便症状｜泄泻

V002-N01326.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01326.label: 五更泄
V002-N01326.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N01326.definition: diarrhea occurring daily at dawn, usually due to kidney yang deficiency, the same as early morning diarrhea

V002-N01327.label: 大瘕泄
V002-N01327.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N01327.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01327.label: 大瘕泄
V002-N01327.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01327.definition: Characterized by diarrhoea, abdominal pain, tenesmus and stools that contain mucus or blood. Often occurs when internal build up of damp heat (due to emotions or improper diet) obstructs the flow of intestinal qi and impairs intestinal collaterals. Over time, individuals may develop deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V002-N01327.label: 大瘕泄
V002-N01327.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜泄泻
V002-N01327.definition: 因情志刺激，饮食失调，湿热内蕴等，使大肠气机阻滞，络脉受损，传导失常，久之脾肾亏虚所致。以腹泻，腹痛，里急后重，便中夹有粘液脓血为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N01328.label: 暴泻
V002-N01328.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N01328.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01328.label: 暴泻
V002-N01328.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01328.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden abdominal pain and diarrhoea. Vomiting and fever may also be present. Often results from improper diet or exposure to wind, cold or damp heat.

V002-N01328.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01328.label: 暴泻
V002-N01328.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01328.label: 暴泻
V002-N01328.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V002-N01328.definition: 以急起腹痛、腹泻为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01328.label: 暴泻
V002-N01328.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证｜泄泻
V002-N01328.definition: 因邪袭肠道，传化失调，水谷清浊不分。以急起腹痛、腹泻为主要表现的泄泻类疾病。

V002-N01328.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01328.label: 暴泻
V002-N01328.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N01328.definition: a pathological change characterized by sudden onset of diarrhea with profuse discharge

V002-N01329.label: 飧泄
V002-N01329.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病｜泄泻病

V002-N01329.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01329.label: 飧泄
V002-N01329.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01329.definition: A type of diarrhoea characterized by repeated, food-related diarrhoea that contains undigested food. Contributing factors may include yang qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach. an improper diet or external wind, cold, damp or heat affecting the stomach and intestines.

V002-N01329.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01329.label: 飧泄
V002-N01329.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01329.label: 泄泻
V002-N01329.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01329.definition: 感受外邪、饮食所伤、情志失调及脏腑虚弱，导致脾胃运化功能失职，湿邪内盛。症见排便次数增多，粪质稀薄或完谷不化，甚至泻出如水样等。

V002-N01329.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01329.label: 飧泄
V002-N01329.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N01329.definition: diarrhea marked by watery stool containing undigested food

V002-N01330.label: 类霍乱
V002-N01330.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01330.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01330.label: 类霍乱
V002-N01330.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01330.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden abdominal pain, vomiting and diarrhoea. Often results from stomach/intestine qi disorder due to ingestion of contaminated food or exposure to summer (damp) heat or cold dampness.

V002-N01330.label: 类霍乱
V002-N01330.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01330.definition: 因食入含有邪毒的食物，或因寒湿暑热等邪内侵，使胃肠气机紊乱，运化失常所致。以突发腹痛，呕吐，腹泻为主要表现的胃肠疾病。

V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01331.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第2部分 外科学｜其他[外科学]｜内痈

V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N01331.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01331.definition: Characterized by fever, right lower abdominal pain and contracture, abdominal tenderness or palpable lumps. Often results from toxic heat accumulating in the intestines.

V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜外科疾病｜外科其他疾病
V002-N01331.definition: 以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主 要表现的疾病。

V002-N01331.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医外科疾病｜疮疡｜痈
V002-N01331.definition: 因热毒内聚，淤结肠中，而生痈成脓。以发热、右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医外科疾病｜其他外科疾病
V002-N01331.definition: 因热毒内聚，淤结肠中，而生痈成脓。以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N01331.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01331.label: 肠痈
V002-N01331.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜外科
V002-N01331.definition: a localized pyogenic inflammation of the intestine, referring to acute appendicitis

V002-N01332.label: 肠痹
V002-N01332.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01332.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01332.label: 肠痹
V002-N01332.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01332.definition: Characterized by polydipsia, dysuria, diarrhoea and abdominal distension/pain. Often occurs when wind, cold and dampness obstructs the flow of intestinal qi and water.

V002-N01332.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01332.label: 肠痹
V002-N01332.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜内科病

V002-N01332.label: 肠痹
V002-N01332.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01332.definition: 多由腹部手术后，或因肠道、腹部的病变，或是全身疾患、瘫痪等的影响，使肠体麻痹，气机不通所致。以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣、矢气为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N01334.label: 肠郁
V002-N01334.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01334.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01334.label: 肠郁
V002-N01334.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01334.definition: Characterized by abdominal pain and alternating diarrohea with constipation. The symptoms are closely associated with fluctuating emotions. Often results from qi stagnation due to emotional disturbance.

V002-N01334.label: 肠郁
V002-N01334.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01334.definition: 因情志不舒，气机郁滞，使肠道运化失常。以腹痛、腹泻或便秘为常见表现的郁病类疾病。

V002-N01335.label: 胃疡
V002-N01335.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01335.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01335.label: 胃疡
V002-N01335.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01335.definition: Characterized by frequent gastric pain/discomfort, acid reflux or black stools. Contributing factors may include liver qi stagnation, improper diet, exposure to external pathogenic factors or drug-related side-effects. These factors may affect the functions of the spleen and stomach and impair stomach collaterals.

V002-N01335.label: 胃疡
V002-N01335.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01335.definition: 多因情志郁怒，饮食不节，或因外邪侵扰，药物刺激等，使脾胃失健，胃络受损而出现溃疡。以经常性胃脘疼痛为主要表现的内疡类疾病。

V002-N01336.label: 胃痈
V002-N01336.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01337.label: 胃痞病
V002-N01337.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01337.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01337.label: 胃痞
V002-N01337.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01337.definition: 以胃脘部痞塞、满闷不舒，触之无形，按之柔软、压之无痛，纳食减少为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01337.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01337.label: 胃痞病
V002-N01337.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01337.definition: Characterized by stomach stuffiness and distension without tenderness. Associated symptoms include a low food intake, abdominal diarrhoea, weight loss and weakness. Often results from qi deficiency of the spleen and stomach and malnourishment/atrophy of stomach collaterals.

V002-N01337.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01337.label: 痞满
V002-N01337.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜诊法

V002-N01337.label: 痞满病
V002-N01337.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V002-N01337.definition: 以胃脘部雍塞，满闷不舒，触之无形，按之柔 软，压之无痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01337.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01337.label: 痞满
V002-N01337.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑疾病｜脾胃病
V002-N01337.definition: 以胃脘部壅塞、满闷不舒、触之无形、按之柔软、压之无痛为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01337.label: 痞满
V002-N01337.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01337.definition: 因中焦气机阻滞，脾胃升降失职，出现以脘腹满闷不舒为主症的病证。自觉胀满，触之无形，按之柔软，压之无痛为临床特点。病因是饮食不节、情志失调、药物所伤等引起。

V002-N01337.label: 胃痞
V002-N01337.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01337.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃气虚，胃络失养而萎缩。以长期食少，胃部痞胀，腹泻，消瘦乏力为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V002-N01337.label: 痞满
V002-N01337.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状
V002-N01337.definition: 感觉体腔或脏腑内满闷堵塞的表现，可发生于胸部、腹部、胃脘部等。

V002-N01337.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01337.label: 痞满
V002-N01337.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类
V002-N01337.definition: unwell feeling of stuffiness and fullness in the chest and upper abdomen

V002-N01338.label: 胃瘅
V002-N01338.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01338.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01338.label: 胃瘅
V002-N01338.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01338.definition: An acute condition characterized by sudden stomach ache, vomiting of blood, and black stools. Often results from irritation to the stomach and damage to stomach collaterals.

V002-N01338.label: 胃瘅
V002-N01338.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01338.definition: 因各种原因刺激胃体，使胃之络脉受损。以骤起脘痛，或以呕血或黑便为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N01339.label: 胃石病
V002-N01339.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01339.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01339.label: 胃石病
V002-N01339.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01339.definition: Characterized by palpable lumps in the upper abdomen, accompanied by stomach ache, nausea, vomiting, and a poor appetite. Often results from swallowing of hair, ingestion of minerals or excessive ingestion of food rich in tannic acid such as persimmon, hawthorn or date plum.

V002-N01340.label: 胃络痛
V002-N01340.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01340.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01340.label: 胃络痛
V002-N01340.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01340.definition: Characterized by irregular stomach ache, stuffiness and distension. Often results from stomach qi disorder and disharmony of stomach collaterals.

V002-N01340.label: 胃络痛
V002-N01340.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01340.definition: 因各种不良因素的长期刺激，使胃之气机紊乱，络脉失和。以无规律的胃脘疼痛、痞胀等为主要表现的痛病类疾病。

V002-N01341.label: 胃缓
V002-N01341.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01341.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01341.label: 胃缓
V002-N01341.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01341.definition: 以脘腹坠胀作痛，食后或站立时甚等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01341.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01341.label: 胃缓
V002-N01341.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01341.definition: Characterized by a painful, downbearing sensation of the abdomen that aggravates after eating food or in a standing position. Muscle wasting may also be present. Often results from spleen qi sinking due to improper diet or overexertion.

V002-N01341.label: 胃缓
V002-N01341.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01341.definition: 多因长期饮食失调，或因劳倦太过等，使中气亏虚，脾气下陷，肌肉瘦削不坚，固护升举无力，以致胃体下坠。以脘腹坠胀作痛，食后或站立时为甚的劳病类疾病。

V002-N01342.label: 胃胀病
V002-N01342.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01342.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01342.label: 胃痞
V002-N01342.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01342.definition: 以胃脘部痞塞、满闷不舒，触之无形，按之柔软、压之无痛，纳食减少为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01342.label: 胃胀
V002-N01342.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾系病类

V002-N01342.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01342.label: 胃胀病
V002-N01342.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01342.definition: Characterized by persistent stomach stuffiness, distension, pain and discomfort. Associated symptoms include acid reflux and oedema. Often results from dysfunctional spleen and stomach or internal turbid phlegm obstructing the flow of qi.

V002-N01342.label: 胃胀
V002-N01342.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01342.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃失健，或湿浊痰瘀内蕴，阻滞气机所致。以长期脘腹痞胀作痛、嘈杂，或有浮肿等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N01342.label: 心下痞
V002-N01342.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜一般症状｜痞满
V002-N01342.definition: 自觉心下胃脘部满闷堵塞、按之却柔软不痛的表现。

V002-N01343.label: 胃饮
V002-N01343.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01343.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01343.label: 胃饮
V002-N01343.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01343.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, splashing sound in the abdomen and vomiting of watery fluids. Often results from water/fluid retention in the stomach and intestines due to abdominal surgery or acid reflux.

V002-N01343.label: 胃饮
V002-N01343.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01343.definition: 因腹部手术后，或因胃反等病，脾胃受损，运化输布失常，导致水饮停聚于胃肠。以脘腹痞胀，腹中水声漉漉，呕吐水液等为主要表现的痰饮类疾病。

V002-N01344.label: 胰痈
V002-N01344.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01344.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01344.label: 胰痈
V002-N01344.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01344.definition: 痈发生于胰，以腹痛，发热，上腹包块为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01344.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01344.label: 胰痈
V002-N01344.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01344.definition: Characterized by a history of severe pancreas heat for 2–3 weeks, coupled with high fever, persistent upper abdominal pain that radiates to the back and left lower back, and a palpable cystic lump in the upper abdomen with a fixed location, a sense of mobility and tenderness. Jaundice may also be present. Often secondary to pancreas heat, it develops when retained toxins in the pancreas cause decay of qi and blood.

V002-N01344.label: 胰痈
V002-N01344.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01344.definition: 常继发于胰瘅之后，邪毒蕴胰，气血败腐。以腹痛，发热，上腹包块为主要表现的内脏痈病类疾病。

V002-N01345.label: 胰瘅
V002-N01345.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01345.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01345.label: 胰瘅
V002-N01345.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01345.definition: 以急起上腹剧痛，伴恶心呕吐，发热，尿血淀粉酶增高为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01345.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01345.label: 胰瘅
V002-N01345.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01345.definition: Characterized by sudden, severe upper abdominal pain, coupled with nausea, vomiting, fever and increased amylase in urine. Often results from excessive alcohol use, binge eating, or extreme emotions. It may also be secondary to gallstones or ascaris-induced colic, which results in retention of damp heat in the pancreas.

V002-N01345.label: 胰瘅
V002-N01345.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01345.definition: 因酗酒或暴食，或情志刺激，或继发于胆石、蛔厥等病之后，湿热邪毒壅积于胰所致。以急起上腹剧痛，伴恶心呕吐，发热，尿血淀粉酶增高为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N01346.label: 胰胀
V002-N01346.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01346.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01346.label: 胰胀
V002-N01346.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01346.definition: 以反复发作的脘腹痛胀，消瘦、腹泻等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01346.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01346.label: 胰胀
V002-N01346.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01346.definition: Characterized by weight loss and repeated abdominal pain, distension and diarrhoea. Often results from toxic pathogenic factors affecting the pancreas and spleen.

V002-N01346.label: 胰胀
V002-N01346.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01346.definition: 多因胰、胆等现的长期影响，邪毒蕴胰，使胰体受损，脾失健运。以反复发作的脘腹痛胀，消瘦，腹泻等为主要表现的内脏胀[著]病类疾病。

V002-N01347.label: 脾水
V002-N01347.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01347.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01347.label: 脾水
V002-N01347.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿[病]
V002-N01347.definition: 脾阳困虚，不能云华，水湿内停，以腹部胀大，四肢沉重，食少，面色萎黄，尿少，脉濡为特征的水肿病

V002-N01347.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01347.label: 脾水
V002-N01347.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01347.definition: Characterized by increased abdominal size, oedema, scanty urine, and heaviness of the limbs. A poor appetite and a sallow complexion may be present. Often results from spleen yang deficiency and water retention due to chronic stomach, intestine, liver or gallbladder problems.

V002-N01347.label: 脾水
V002-N01347.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V002-N01347.definition: 脾不能运化水湿所致的水肿病。

V002-N01347.label: 脾水
V002-N01347.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01347.definition: 因胃肠肝胆的慢性病变，使脾虚不运，营气亏少，水湿内停。以水肿，腹胀，疲乏等为主要表现的水肿类疾病。

V002-N01348.label: 脾消
V002-N01348.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01348.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01348.label: 脾痿
V002-N01348.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肢体病｜五痿
V002-N01348.definition: 以四肢萎软，食少，腹胀，腹泻，疲乏，消瘦等为特征的痿病。

V002-N01348.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01348.label: 脾消
V002-N01348.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01348.definition: A chronic condition characterized by wasting of the limbs, fatigue, diarrhoea, and strong-odoured oily or foamy stools. A poor appetite, abdominal distension, muscle pain, oedema, spoon nails and clubbed fingers/toes may be present. Often results from poor digestion and absorption (malnourishment of the body) due to chronic problems of the stomach, intestine or other organs.

V002-N01348.label: 脾痿
V002-N01348.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01348.definition: 因胃肠的慢性久病，或因它脏病变影响，进食过少等，使脾气痿弱，精微匮乏，机体失却充养。以食少，腹胀，腹泻，疲乏，消瘦等为主要表现的内脏痿病类疾病。

V002-N01349.label: 脾瘅
V002-N01349.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01349.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01349.label: 脾瘅
V002-N01349.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01349.definition: Characterized by overeating, overweight, belly fat and a sweet, greasy taste in the mouth. Often results from overeating of oily, sweet food and physical inactivity.

V002-N01350.label: 脾胀
V002-N01350.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01350.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01350.label: 脾胀
V002-N01350.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01350.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension, discomfort of the four limbs, body heaviness, and splashing sound in the abdomen. A poor appetite, hiccups, restlessness and insomnia may also be present. Often occurs when cold damp affects the transportation and transformation of the spleen.

V002-N01352.label: 膈疝
V002-N01352.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01352.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01352.label: 膈疝
V002-N01352.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜脾胃病
V002-N01352.definition: 以胃体逆入胸膈，脘膈部痞胀疼痛，呕吐等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01352.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01352.label: 膈疝
V002-N01352.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01352.definition: Characterized by sudden distension and pain in the diaphragmatic area and severe vomiting. It results either from congenital defect or postnatal injuries.

V002-N01352.label: 膈疝
V002-N01352.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01352.definition: 因痰气阻滞，胃失和降，进而使部分胃体逆入胸膈，壅塞气机。以脘膈部痞胀疼痛，呕吐等为主要表现的疝病类疾病。

V002-N01353.label: 萎黄病
V002-N01353.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01353.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01353.label: 萎黄病
V002-N01353.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01353.definition: Characterized by dry, sallow complexion, pale eyelids and finger/toe nails, dizziness and fatigue. Chapped lips, poor memory and difficulty concentrating may be present. Contributing factors may include malnutrition, weakness of the spleen and stomach, food retention, parasites or heavy menstruation.

V002-N01354.label: 谷劳
V002-N01354.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01354.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01354.label: 谷劳
V002-N01354.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01354.definition: Characterized by drowsiness after eating food and heaviness of the limbs. Abdominal fullness, rapid hunger and a poor appetite may also be present. Often results from deficiency of the spleen and stomach.

V002-N01354.label: 食后困顿
V002-N01354.path: 临床术语｜症状体征｜四诊类症状体征｜睡眠症状
V002-N01354.definition: 属于胸腹症状。饭后困倦嗜睡，或进餐中疲困难支而停食入睡者。

V002-N01355.label: 酒癖
V002-N01355.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01355.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01355.label: 酒癖
V002-N01355.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第1部分 内科学｜肝胆病
V002-N01355.definition: 以嗜酒无度，脘胁疼痛，胁下痞块，口渴、烦热、日渐消瘦，可伴见面发齿斑，肝掌，蜘蛛痣，黄疸等为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01355.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01355.label: 酒癖
V002-N01355.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01355.definition: Characterized by pain and masses in the subcostal region, thirst, restlessness, and gradual weight loss. Red spots on the face, red palms, spider angioma and jaundice may be present. Contributing factors may include retention of alcoholic toxin, phlegm and stasis in the subcostal region due to prolonged alcohol drinking, damp heat accumulating in the spleen and stomach and disharmony between qi and blood.

V002-N01355.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01355.label: 酒癖
V002-N01355.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜病因

V002-N01355.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01355.label: 偏食
V002-N01355.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医儿科疾病｜伤食｜饮食不节
V002-N01355.definition: 对某一种类型的食物过分偏爱和进食。

V002-N01355.label: 酒癖
V002-N01355.path: 临床术语｜病因病机｜病因｜内伤病因｜饮食失宜｜饮食偏嗜

V002-N01355.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01355.label: 酒癖
V002-N01355.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜基础理论｜病因类
V002-N01355.definition: the state of heavy dependence on alcohol

V002-N01356.label: 食亦
V002-N01356.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01356.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01356.label: 食亦
V002-N01356.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01356.definition: Characterized by increased appetite, rapid hunger after eating food, weight loss, lassitude and dry stools. Contributing factors may include an improper diet, over ingestion of oily, sweet food, or excessive alcohol drinking. These factors may cause damp heat to accumulate in the stomach, intestines and gallbladder, which in turn affects the normal conduction of the gallbladder and stomach.

V002-N01356.label: 食亦
V002-N01356.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01356.definition: 因胃肠及胆腑湿热，肝脾不和，运化传导异常，食物经胃肠移易而过，食虽多而不生肌肉。以发作性多食为主症，但检查无特殊改变的脾系疾病。

V002-N01357.label: 食管痹
V002-N01357.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01357.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01357.label: 食管痹
V002-N01357.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01357.definition: Characterized by intermittent dysphagia and vomiting. Contributing factors may include improper diet, emotional disturbance or damage to the oesophagus. These factors cause qi stagnation and ascending of stomach qi.

V002-N01357.label: 食管痹
V002-N01357.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01357.definition: 多因饮食不慎，情志失调，或因食管受损后形成瘢痕等，导致气机阻滞，胃气上逆。以间歇性进食梗塞，呕吐为主要表现的内脏痹病类疾病。

V002-N01358.label: 食管瘅
V002-N01358.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01358.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01358.label: 食管瘅
V002-N01358.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01358.definition: Characterized by chest pain behind the sternum with a burning sensation, stomach discomfort and acid reflux. Contributing factors may include exposure to pathogenic factors/ irritating/drugs, internal heat or a prolonged ascending of rebellious stomach qi.

V002-N01358.label: 食管瘅
V002-N01358.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜中医内科疾病｜脏腑系统疾病｜脾胃病证
V002-N01358.definition: 因染受邪毒，或因刺激性饮食及毒品的损伤，或因郁热内蕴，以及长期胃气上逆等，使食管受损，脉络瘀滞。以胸骨后灼热感与疼痛、嘈杂等为主要表现的内脏瘅[热]病类疾病。

V002-N01359.label: 饥疝
V002-N01359.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V002-N01359.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01359.label: 饥疝
V002-N01359.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01359.definition: Characterized by rapid hunger after eating food, followed by stomach ache that alleviates with eating food or warmth. Often results from cold qi retention in the stomach and heart meridians due to constitutional yang deficiency or ingestion of raw, cold food.

V002-N01360.label: 鼻病类术语
V002-N01360.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病

V002-N01361.label: 鼻塞
V002-N01361.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01361.definition: 鼻腔堵塞，通气不畅的表现。

V002-N01361.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01361.label: 鼻塞
V002-N01361.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜诊断学｜问诊类

V002-N01362.label: 伤风鼻塞
V002-N01362.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语｜鼻塞

V002-N01362.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01362.label: 伤风鼻塞
V002-N01362.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01362.definition: 感受风邪引起的以鼻塞、流涕、喷嚏为主要表现的急性鼻病。

V002-N01362.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01362.label: 伤风鼻塞
V002-N01362.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01362.definition: Characterized by stuffy nose, runny nose (clear or thick nasal discharges), sneezing or other common cold symptoms. It is often caused by wind cold or wind heat affecting the lung and obstructing the nasal cavity.

V002-N01362.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01362.label: 伤风鼻塞
V002-N01362.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01362.definition: 感受风邪引起的以鼻塞、流涕、喷嚏为主要表现的急性鼻病。

V002-N01363.label: 鼻窒
V002-N01363.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语｜鼻塞

V002-N01363.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01363.label: 鼻窒
V002-N01363.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01363.definition: 以经常性鼻塞为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01363.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01363.label: 鼻窒
V002-N01363.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01363.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01363.label: 鼻窒
V002-N01363.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01363.definition: 以经常性鼻塞为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01363.label: 鼻窒
V002-N01363.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01363.definition: 以鼻塞时轻时重，或双侧交替性鼻塞，甚至 不闻香臭，反复发作，经久不愈为主要表现 的疾病。

V002-N01363.label: 鼻窒
V002-N01363.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01363.definition: 是指以经常性鼻塞为主要特征的慢性鼻病。

V002-N01364.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01364.label: 鼻异物
V002-N01364.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01364.definition: 外物误入鼻内引起的鼻病。

V002-N01364.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01364.label: 鼻异物
V002-N01364.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01364.definition: 外物误入鼻内引起的鼻病。

V002-N01364.label: 鼻异物
V002-N01364.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01364.definition: 是指异物误入滞留鼻窍。

V002-N01365.label: 鼻损伤
V002-N01365.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01365.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01365.label: 鼻损伤
V002-N01365.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01365.definition: 以鼻部遭受外伤，局部瘀肿疼痛，皮肉破损，甚至鼻骨骨折、鼻伤衄血为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01365.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01365.label: 鼻损伤
V002-N01365.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01365.definition: 以鼻部遭受外伤，局部瘀肿疼痛，皮肉破损，甚至鼻骨骨折、鼻伤衄血为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01365.label: 鼻损伤
V002-N01365.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01365.definition: 以鼻部损伤淤肿，皮肉破损，鼻梁骨折或鼻 衄为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01365.label: 鼻损伤
V002-N01365.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01365.definition: 是指鼻部遭受外力作用而致的损伤。

V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01366.definition: 以鼻内干燥，甚至鼻粘膜萎缩、鼻腔宽大为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01366.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01366.definition: Characterized by dryness inside the nose, turbinate hypertrophy, atrophy of the mucous membrane, foul-smelling crusts, and decreased sensitivity to smell. Often results from malnourishment of the nose due to deficiency of the zang–fu organs.

V002-N01366.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁

V002-N01366.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01366.definition: 以鼻内干燥，甚至鼻黏膜萎缩、鼻腔宽大为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01366.definition: 以鼻内干燥、鼻塞、鼻痂多、鼻气腥臭，鼻黏 膜萎缩，鼻腔宽大为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01366.definition: 是指以鼻内干燥、粘膜萎缩，甚或鼻腔宽大为特征的慢性鼻病。

V002-N01366.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01366.label: 鼻槁
V002-N01366.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01366.definition: a disease of the nose characterized by dry mucous membrane with atrophy, enlarged nasal passages and foul smell

V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01367.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01367.definition: 以鼻部浊涕，量多不止为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜眼、耳、鼻和喉系统病类

V002-N01367.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01367.definition: Characterized by thick nasal mucus, nasal obstruction, decreased sensitivity to smell. Individuals may also experience pus discharge, dizziness and head distension. If often results from contraction of exogenous pathogens, retained heat in the zang–fu organs, or deficiency of the zang–fu organs.

V002-N01367.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01367.label: 脑漏
V002-N01367.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01367.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊

V002-N01367.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01367.definition: 以鼻流浊涕，量多不止为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01367.definition: 以鼻流浊涕，量多不止，常伴有头痛、鼻塞、 嗅觉减退为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01367.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01367.definition: 因外邪侵袭，或脏腑蕴热，蒸灼鼻窍，或因脏腑虚损，邪留鼻窦所致。以鼻流浊涕量多、鼻塞、嗅觉减退、头晕胀闷、鼻道有脓等为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01367.definition: 是指以鼻流浊涕、量多不止为主要特征的鼻病。

V002-N01367.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01367.label: 鼻渊
V002-N01367.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01367.definition: a nasal disease characterized by persistent excessive flow of turbid nasal discharge

V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01368.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01368.definition: 以鼻前孔附近痒痛不适，局部皮肤红肿、糜烂、渗液、结痂等为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01368.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01368.definition: Characterized by recurrent red, swollen, itchy and painful sores on the nose. Often occurs when wind, heat or dampness steam the nasal cavity.

V002-N01368.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01368.label: 鼻疮
V002-N01368.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01368.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01368.definition: 以鼻前孔附近痒痛不适，局部皮肤红肿、糜烂、渗液、结痂等为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01368.definition: 以鼻前孔附近皮肤红肿、糜烂、结痂、灼痒， 经久不愈，反复发作为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01368.label: 鼻疳
V002-N01368.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01368.definition: 是指因湿热邪毒上犯或血虚生风化燥而致的以鼻前孔及其附近皮肤红肿、糜烂、渗液、结痂、灼痒，或皲裂为主要特征的鼻病。在古代医籍中又有鼻疮、鼻？疮、鼻？、？鼻、赤鼻、疳鼻等别称。

V002-N01368.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01368.label: 鼻疮
V002-N01368.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01368.definition: a disease marked by recurrent inflammation of the nasal vestibule with ulceration, crusting, itching and pain, the same as nasal vestibulitis

V002-N01369.label: 鼻窦痰包
V002-N01369.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01369.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01369.label: 鼻窦痰包
V002-N01369.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01369.definition: Characterized by stuffy nose, poor sense of smell, drowsiness, and thick nasal discharge that is usually green in colour (like egg white). Alternatively, local distension, pain or discomfort may be present. It is often caused by turbid phlegm and damp heat affecting the head, face and nose.

V002-N01369.label: 鼻窦痰包
V002-N01369.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01369.definition: 以鼻塞，嗅觉障碍，头昏胀闷，鼻内泌出蛋清 样涕，或按压局部胀痛不适等为主要表现的 疾病。

V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: GB T 15657-2021 中医病证分类与代码｜中医疾病｜鼻病类术语

V002-N01370.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: GB T 42467系列标准 中医临床名词术语｜第9部分 耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病（总）
V002-N01370.definition: 以突然和反复发作的鼻痒、喷嚏、流清涕、比赛等为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: ICD-11中文-传统医学部分｜传统医学疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜眼、耳、鼻和喉系统病类

V002-N01370.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM｜诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V002-N01370.definition: Characterized by sudden or recurrent nasal itching, sneezing, and runny or stuffy nose. Often results from genetic factors, deficiency of the zang–fu organs coupled with contraction of exogenous pathogens, or exposure to pollen, dust or polluted air.

V002-N01370.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01370.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V002-N01370.label: 鼽嚏
V002-N01370.path: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准｜眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V002-N01370.vocabName: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）
V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: 中医药学名词-外科学等（2013）｜中医耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病
V002-N01370.definition: 以突然和反复发作的鼻痒、喷嚏、流清涕、鼻塞等为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: 中医药学名词_2004｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜鼻病
V002-N01370.definition: 以突然和反复的鼻痒、鼻塞、喷嚏、流清涕， 鼻腔黏膜苍白肿胀为主要表现的疾病。

V002-N01370.vocabName: 中国中医药学主题词表
V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: 中国中医药学主题词表｜TC[中医病症]｜中医五官科疾病｜中医耳鼻咽喉科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01370.definition: 因禀质特异，脏腑虚损，兼感外邪，或感受花粉、粉尘及不洁之气反致。以突然或反复的鼻痒、喷嚏频频、清涕如水、鼻塞等为主要表现的鼻病。

V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: 临床术语｜病证｜中医疾病｜其他身体系统疾病｜中医五官科疾病｜中医鼻疾病
V002-N01370.definition: 是指以突然和反复发作的鼻痒、打喷嚏、流清涕、鼻塞为主要特征的鼻病。

V002-N01370.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V002-N01370.label: 鼻鼽
V002-N01370.path: 传统医学名词术语国际标准｜临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V002-N01370.definition: a disease characterized by sudden and recurrent attacks of nasal itching, sneezing, thin discharge and stuffy nose
